title: Klåss Clerkx - CEO for One Month 2016 at Adecco Group Belgium
description: The #CEO1Month selection process started with 1143 candidates. On May 20th a bootcamp was organised with the 6 final candidates. The jury, together with Belgian CEO Nico Reeskens, appointed Klåss Clerkx as CEO for One Month of Adecco Group Belgium. Klåss is a Master student in Applied Economic Sciences at the University of Hasselt. When he's not studying you probably find can him on a football pitch. Klåss is referee at the Royal Belgian Football Federation and operates in the fourth national division. No wonder that his favourite quote is  "giving the assist is as important as scoring yourself". www.adeccowaytowork.com

title: Adecco Thailand WayToWork 2014
description:
กะเทาะเปลือกเด็กจบใหม่ ครั้งที่ 2 กิจกรรมเพื่อพัฒนาศักยภาพและเส้นทางอาชีพของเด็กไทย จัดโดยกลุ่มบริษัทอเด็คโก้ประเทศไทย ในวันที่ 30 เมษายน 2557 ณ ห้องกรุงเทพ ชั้น 9 โรงแรมแลนด์มาร์ค กิจกรรมนี้เป็นการรวมทีมมือโปรมาให้คำปรึกษากับน้องๆ ให้ได้รู้จักตัวเอง ค้นหาศักยภาพที่ซ่อนอยู่ ดึงความเด่น ความชอบ และความถนัดของตัวเองออกมา เพื่อก้าวเข้าสู่โลกของการทำงานอย่างมีความสุข และได้ทำงานในสิ่งที่รัก พบกับแขกรับเชิญที่จะมาพูดถึงประสบการร์การทำงานในชีวิตจริง การนำความรู้และทักษะจากสิ่งที่เรียนมาประยุกต์ใช้ในสไตล์ของแต่ละคน วิธีทำให้เราสนุกกับการทำงาน และแสดงศักยภาพของตนเองออกมา 

นอกจากนี้ยังมีสัมมนาเทคนิคที่ช่วยให้เรซูเม่ของคุณเด่นพอที่นายจ้างจะหยิบขึ้นมาพิจารณา และแบ่งปันเคล็ดลับในการสัมภาษณ์งานที่ช่วยให้ผู้สัมภาษณ์ทราบจุดเด่นของคุณอย่างง่ายดาย

title: Adecco Support Employees Impacted By Bangkok Violence In May
description: Tidarat Kanchanawat, Country Manager, Adecco Group Thailand, announced the recovery program to aid unemployed staff who were impacted from the turmoil situation on May 19: "Adecco has prepared a solution to help aid and recover those unemployed by the recent problems in Bangkok. We will actively liaise with our client companies to find employment for those displaced. This is clearly a very difficult situation for those that now have nowhere to work -- as well as for their families.  In addition to providing job vacancy lists, Adecco is also organizing a free one-day Resume Writing & Interview Techniques Training course as well as support in basic psychological rehabilitation after the political riots for those who are now unemployed. Our aim is to help people move on in both their careers and lives".

title: Baloise Jobcast #5: Von Anlagen, Risiken und Physik
description:
In der fünften Folge des Jobcast sprechen wir mit Thomas Schöb, Leiter Asset Strategy und Investment Controlling bei Baloise Asset Management. Wir unterhalten uns mit ihm über Einstiegsmöglichkeiten in seinem Bereich, den richtigen Umgang mit Risiken und die grossen Fragen, die einen Asset Manager bewegen.

Show Notes

01:45: Was macht ein Physiker in der Versicherungsbranche?
02:15: Was sind Assets?
03:16: Was bedeutet es, Assets zu managen?
04:22: Was ist Asset-Strategie?
05:44: Was ist an dieser Arbeit faszinierend?
06:37: Wovon ist der Erfolg einer Asset-Strategie abhängig?
08:44: Wie verhält man sich bei Krisensituationen in der Anlagestrategie?
10:07: Was sind die grössten Fragen und Herausforderungen am Horizont?
11:15: Wie geht man mit Risiken im privaten Umfeld um?
12:44: Welche Leute arbeiten in der Asset-Strategie?
14:24: Passen auch Leute ohne ökonomischen Hintergrund in diesen Bereich?
14:58: Was kann eine Versicherung als Arbeitgeber bieten, was eine Bank nicht bieten kann?
16:10: Welche berufliche Möglichkeiten gibt es im Bereich Asset Management?
16:37: Welche Tips für Bewerber hast du?
17:47: Wie kann man mit Thomas in Kontakt treten? LinkedIn-Profil von Thomas Schöb: https://ch.linkedin.com/in/thomas-sch%C3%B6b-09626592
18:42: Offene Stellen im Baloise Asset Management: Baloise Stellenmarkt https://www.baloise.ch/de/ueber-uns/karriere/stellenangebote.html&src=CWS-11360 : Tätigkeitsbereich „Asset & Portfolio Management“. Die aktuell ausgeschriebene Stelle als Sales Manager Asset Manager findet ihr hier: https://www.baloise.com/de/home/karriere/jobs/jobdetail~job=000003WK~lang=de~&src=CWS-11360

title: Film-NL.avi
description:
Afval wordt door de meeste mensen als ongewenst beschouwd, als iets zonder waarde. De Van Gansewinkel Groep denkt daar heel anders over. Want in het afval van vandaag groeit de kiem voor de producten en goederen va morgen. Wij maken er zelf graag iets moois van. 

De Van Gansewinkel Groep is zowel afvaldienstverlener als grondstoffen- en energieleverancier. We verzamelen afval in en bewerken of verwerken afval tot grondstoffen en energie. De Benelux is onze thuismarkt, maar we zijn ook actief in Tsjechië, Polen, Frankrijk, Hongarije en Portugal. Zo'n 6000 medewerkers realiseren een jaaromzet van circa 1,2 miljard euro. 

Adecco rekruteert verschillende profielen M/V voor Van gansewinkel.  Neem alvast een kijkje op http://www.adecco.be/nl-BE/kandidaten/Een-job-via-Adecco/Pages/jobs-bij-van-gansewinkel.aspx

title: Adecco Way To Work: Japanese winner visits Thailand
description:
With the Adecco Way to Work program, Adecco wants to offer our time, expertise, professional skills and training tools to help young people to make their first job experiences.

The contest has made it possible for nine lucky individuals to experience different vocations all around the world during this summer. 

Masaki Hamaguchi from Japan, one of our Adecco Way To Way winners, has an opportunity to gain the unforgettable job experience about the exquisite of Thai Cuisine to be a Thai Cuisine Chef at Silom Village (http://www.silomvillage.co.th) under the theme 'Touch the spirit of Authentic Thai food'. 

He also has a chance to experience the second job as a masseur with the experts at Phothalai, the Thai Wellness Center (http://www.plp.co.th/wellness).  

Watch the video to see how he enjoys these two careers. For more information, visit http://www.adecco.co.th or http://masaki.adeccoworkexperiencecontest.com (in Japanese).

title: ABB Robotics - Celebrating the World Cup with our customers
description:
Each year ABB Robotics celebrates the contributions and successes of our Value Providers and Customers at our Value Provider Conferences and Customer Days—events that give our partners intimate access to our newest technology via live robotics demonstrations, business updates and breakout sessions. 

We also take the opportunity at these events to hand out awards to partners whose contributions have resulted in unique and innovative robotic automation solutions and have made an especially positive impact on ABB Robotics' ability to reach more end-customers. This year the awards at our 2014 European Value Provider Conference and Customer Day, held in Barcelona, Spain, from June 17-19, were poignant in that they coincided with our 40 year anniversary and delivery of our 250,000th robot.

With the 2014 FIFA World Cup as a backdrop, we wanted to hold the awards ceremony in a special location. Given that we were in Barcelona, what better place to do it than looking out over the pitch at the legendary FC Barcelona Camp Nou stadium? We had the entire stadium to ourselves, and from the tours of the museum to victory runs out onto the field, it was an event that created memories that will last a lifetime.

title: Non-work related disability in the U.S.
description:
Work-related disability is covered by mandatory workers’ compensation. But the truth is: In the U.S., less than 5% of disabling accidents and illnesses are work related, meaning mandatory workers’ compensation doesn’t cover the 95% of the accidents that happen outside of work.

title: The hospital ward of tomorrow
description:
Many hospitals have invested in new communication solutions, that solve single problems rather than managing the complete workflow at a department. At Herlev hospital in Denmark, there is now a red thread between technology, patient flow and working processes.

At the ward of tomorrow the communication is based around the patient, and the resource planning of nurse, doctor, laboratory personnel, secretaries and porters supports that. The technology builds bridges between administrative and clinical systems from patient administration, patient calling systems and porter bookings to critical alarms, intelligent beds and examination devices -- and secures that all relevant data follows the patient everywhere. At the ward of tomorrow, hospital personnel, patients and systems are joined in a smooth flow, where the patient is in focus and waiting time is reduced to a minimum, and everyone can see the whole of it at the same time.

If you want to know more about how Ascom Wireless Solutions can help streamlining your working processes, ensure patient safety and create a better communication flow at your hospital, contact your local Ascom Wireless Solutions representative.
http://www.ascom.com/ws

title: Adecco Way to Work -- Min viktigste jobberfaring, Freddy Kjensmo
description:
Freddy Kjensmo, komiker, forteller om sin viktigste jobberfaring.

Adecco skal ut i gatene 30. april. Fra 09.30 til 16.30 vil vi gi deg gode råd om CV- og søknadsskriving, intervjutrening og du kan prøve deg i forskjellige yrkesrelaterte oppgaver. Du finner oss sentralt plassert i de største byene og de fleste av kontorene våre rundt omkring i landet vil ha åpen dag.

Ungdomsledigheten er på sitt høyeste i en generasjon. Den er dobbelt så høy som den generelle ledigheten både i Norge og i resten av Europa. Dette ønsker vi å gjøre noe med, og derfor vil hele Adecco Norge være ut i gatene denne dagen for å tilby vår hjelp.

Adecco Way to Work er et globalt initiativ for å bistå unge arbeidssøkere med å gjøre seg mer attraktive for arbeidsmarket. Vårt mål er å gi unge arbeidsledige verktøyene til å komme seg inn på arbeidsmarkedet -- hvordan skriver du CVen og søknadsbrev som skiller seg ut i mengden, hvordan bør du forberede deg til intervju, hva bør du trene på i forkant og hvem bør  du sette som din referanse? Dette kan vi og våre eksperter står klare til å møte deg.

Se våre tips og triks på www.adeccowaytowork.com eller www.adecco.no

title: Adecco: Welcome to the Awesome World of Temping
description:
There are approximately 1.8 million new grads entering the workforce this year. If you're one of them, chances are you can use a little help in your job search. 

That's because, according to our recent survey, a majority of employers (58 percent) are not planning to hire college grads this year. Of those that are, they only plan on hiring one or two candidates.

The great thing about temping is that it helps to show that you're flexible; something that 47 percent of hiring managers advise of recent college graduates. You may not land the perfect position within a company, but by getting your foot in the door and putting in the extra work, you may be closer to your dream job than you think. So, when looking for that first job, don't be afraid to take it back to school!

title: Buswerbung in Luzern
description: Buswerbung in Luzern ist auch international. Luzern gehört zu den schönsten Städten der Welt und ist reich an Sehenswürdigkeiten. Als gesellschaftliches und kulturelles Zentrum der Zentralschweiz zieht Luzern sowohl nationale, als auch internationale Touristen in hoher Zahl an. Der Wirtschaftsraum Luzern wächst kontinuierlich. Die Busse der vbl vernetzen die Stadt und die Agglomeration Luzern. Werbung auf den Bussen ist beliebt.

title: Buswerbung in Winterthur
description: Buswerbung in Winterthur erreicht ein grosses Publikum. Winterthur ist die sechstgrösste Stadt der Schweiz und die zweitgrösste des Kanton Zürich. Früher war Winterthur eine bedeutende Industriestadt, heute ist die Stadt als Dienstleistungs-, Bildungs-, Kultur- und Freizeitzentrum mit 16 Museen bekannt. Der Stadtbus Winterthur erschliesst alle Stadtteile von Winterthur sowie alle umliegenden Gemeinden. Werbung auf den Bussen kommt an.

title: Adecco Way to Work™ - Aktionstag am 30. April 2013

In Deutschland haben wir Sie in allen Niederlassungen deutschlandweit zu einem Tag der offenen Tür herzlich willkommen geheißen und waren zusätzlich an 47 Standorten in 42 Städten für Sie unterwegs.

Mehr Informationen rund um die Initative finden Sie hier auf unserer Webseite: http://www.adecco.de/waytowork

title: Keeping India on track - ABB solutions for Delhi Metro
description:
India is experiencing a rapid rate of urbanization. Delhi Metro Rail Corporation (DMRC) is the first independent metro operator in India, and its metro system is the national benchmark for on-time project execution and efficiency. For this project, ABB supplied traction, receiving and auxiliary substations with compact gas- and air-insulated switchgear, overhead electrification, integrated building and asset management solutions, efficient and low noise level traction transformers, motors, and SCADA (supervisory control and data acquisition) systems. All this technology facilitates the smooth operation of the Dehli metro, as well as enhancing performance and optimizing cost-efficiency. In India, ABB has also provided its rail technology for the metro networks of the cities of Jaipur, Bangalore, Mumbai and Kolkata. 
Web story: http://www.abb.com/cawp/seitp202/f1429176fabff886c1257eed00399267.aspx

title: Zurich Vertrauensschadenversicherung (Crime) - Versicherungsschutz gegen Wirtschaftskriminalität
description:
Die Vertrauensschadenversicherung (Crime) von Zurich bietet Unternehmen Versicherungsschutz gegen Vermögensschäden, die zum Beispiel durch Betrug, Unterschlagung oder Computerkriminalität entstehen. Als mögliche Täter kommen aussenstehende Dritte oder auch Mitarbeiterinnen oder Mitarbeiter sowie Mitglieder von Führungs- oder Aufsichtsorganen in Frage, die Zugang zu Vermögenswerten des Unternehmens haben. Versichert ist das Unternehmen, das sich mit der Vertrauensschadenversicherung vor einer Schädigung durch verschiedene Formen von Wirtschaftskriminalität schützt.

For more information please visit us: http://www.zurich.ch/site/de/com/sme/vertrauensschaden.html

Héctor es un joven toledano de 23 años. Acaba de terminar los estudios de Ingeniería Aeroespacial y ya domina a la perfección el inglés. A pesar de su corta edad, ya tiene experiencia  laboral como Technical Division Intern en el sector de la aeronáutica.  Tras saberse ganador, Héctor Recio aseguró que se trata de “un momento muy especial. Sé que es un tópico recurrir a lo abrumador del momento y la emoción, pero de verdad que es una sensación plena. De oportunidad, de alegría, de objetivo cumplido. Ahora tengo una gran responsabilidad y espero cumplir con ella y estar a la altura de las altísimas expectativas.” 

Más información en: https://www.adeccowaytowork.com/es/ceo-for-one-month/phase-2/

title: Global Citizens Program – Sharing Expertise, Developing People
description:
The aim of the Global Citizens Program (GCP) is to promote the transfer of skills and knowledge between our people and social organizations through skills-based volunteering. The GCP provides opportunities for employees to go on assignment in-country and use their professional skills to build the capacity of our partner organizations in the areas of education and microfinance. By working at a local level, we can respond to the specific needs of our partners and help to develop their projects.

Credit Suisse High-Tech Forum Israel
description:
Building on its long-standing commitment to the high-tech sector and the Israeli market, Credit Suisse created a forum to give successful entrepreneurs and investors a unique platform to get together and exchange views on how to manage their company and private wealth across all stages of entrepreneurial development. The personal nature of this event allows participants to obtain exceptional first-hand insights into the topics, as well as gain new inspiration. To read more: https://hightech.credit-suisse.com/en/home

The Forum speakers - industry leaders, venture capitalists and leading Credit Suisse experts - from both Israel and abroad, shared their thoughts and comments on the Israeli high-tech industry. Speakers included: Chris Cottrell, Head of Digital Media/TMT at Credit Suisse Investment Banking New York; Eyal Waldman, CEO of Mellanox Technologies; David Rowan, editor of Wired Magazine; Ziv Orr, Co-Founder CallVU and winner of Credit Suisse’s first Start-up Award at the High-Tech Conference.

Read the article on our website: http://csg.com/1DTunZb

title: Termometro ¿Sueñan los colombianos con trabajar en el exterior?
description: ADECCO COLOMBIA está trabajando para entender mejor las condiciones reales del mercado laboral colombiano. Para ello realizamos una encuesta para saber si los colombianos sueñan con trabajar en el exterior.

title: Adecco Street Day Colombia 2015 - Way to Work
description:
Por tercer año consecutivo, miles de empleados de Adecco, a nivel mundial, salieron a las calles para mostrarle a los jóvenes el camino hacia trabajo, para que puedan resolver su presente y proyectar su futuro laboral.
 
Adecco Colombia cerró con éxito la campaña “Street Day”, celebrada el  26 de marzo 2015. La jornada impactó a más de 45.000 jóvenes colombianos, en las ocho ciudades participantes. Así mismo, la movilización visitó a más de 20 universidades, en el territorio nacional, en algunas de ellas realizó talleres de empleabilidad para los estudiantes, y entregó más de 20.000 elementos de material educativo con temas de interés relacionados con la búsqueda de trabajo.

title: Adecco rekruteert M/V's voor Fabricom
description:
De projecten van Fabricom zijn niet van de minsten: zij zijn dé Belgische referentie in innovatieve technische installaties en diensten voor industriële, energiegerelateerde, tertiaire en infrastructurele markten. In België en internationaal. 

Hun expertise omvat een brede waaier technische disciplines zoals Electrical, Instrumentation, Mechanical, Industrial Piping, Automation en Maintenance. Toch ben je geen nummer tussen je 4900 collega's. 

We zijn dringend op zoek naar volgende collega's M/V

Aansluiters Elektriciteit & Gas (M/V) - Regio Aalst / Ninove
Kraanman monteur met rijbewijs C (M/V) - Regio Oost-Vlaanderen
Elektriciens Residentieel/Industrieel (M/V) - Antwerpen en Oost-Vlaanderen

title: ABB motors and generators talkshow
description: The ABB's new revolutionary motor drive packages explained in the interview of ABB's Linda Stenman and Ari Tammi (product managers for drives and motors) by Louis Zezeran. The packages are based on the new synchronous reluctance technology, which gives the best of two worlds: the performance of a permanent magnet motor and the cost efficiency and robustness of a conventional induction motor. In the packages a standard induction motor's rotor is replaced with a totally new construction and the drive's software is designed for the technology. This gives the extraordinarily high energy efficiency and power density.

title: Sigurna vožnja u svim vremenskim uvjetima
description: Jednostavno sigurni - sve što činimo usmjereno je na sigurnost jer znamo kako zdravi osjećaj sigurnosti poboljšava kvalitetu života. Naše kontinuirano pozicioniranje kao pružatelja sigurnosti dodatno smo učvrstili našom filozofijom Svijet sigurnosti. Koncept „Svijet sigurnosti" osigurava klijentima pomoć u sprečavanju mogućih šteta, a ako se šteta ipak dogodi, Basler osiguranje Zagreb djeluje odmah, brzo i stručno, s ciljem otklanjanja i umanjenja nastalih štetnih posljedica. www.basler-oz.hr

title: Adecco Win4Youth: riding up Mont Ventoux
description:
On 12 September 2011 70 Adecco Group colleagues from 42 different countries cycled up the Mont Ventoux in France, supporting 1 big project: Win4Youth.

In 2011, all Adecco Group colleagues in more than 60 countries throughout the company are invited to participate in local biking events in order to accumulate kilometers for Win4Youth. For every 5 km Adecco group donates 1 USD to the following foundations in Latin America, Eastern Europe and Asia : 

Brazil: Se Essa Rua Fosse Minha
Social circus defending the rights of children living on the streets of Rio de Janeiro (since 1991).

Greece: The Smile of the Child
Nine community homes give shelter, safety and education to 245 children (since 1996).

Philippines: Roter Keil
Keep boys from the street and give them an education and a future (since 1999).

The initial target was 500.000 km. This target has now been raised to 1.500.000 km or 36 times around the globe

title: Adecco Way to Work - Min viktigste jobberfaring, Kine Stirler Alm
description:
Kine Stirler Alm, avdelingsleder Lillestrøm, Adecco, forteller om sin viktigste jobberfaring.

Adecco skal ut i gatene 30. april. Fra 09.30 til 16.30 vil vi gi deg gode råd om CV- og søknadsskriving, intervjutrening og du kan prøve deg i forskjellige yrkesrelaterte oppgaver. Du finner oss sentralt plassert i de største byene og de fleste av kontorene våre rundt omkring i landet vil ha åpen dag.

Ungdomsledigheten er på sitt høyeste i en generasjon. Den er dobbelt så høy som den generelle ledigheten både i Norge og i resten av Europa. Dette ønsker vi å gjøre noe med, og derfor vil hele Adecco Norge være ut i gatene denne dagen for å tilby vår hjelp.

Adecco Way to Work er et globalt initiativ for å bistå unge arbeidssøkere med å gjøre seg mer attraktive for arbeidsmarket. Vårt mål er å gi unge arbeidsledige verktøyene til å komme seg inn på arbeidsmarkedet -- hvordan skriver du CVen og søknadsbrev som skiller seg ut i mengden, hvordan bør du forberede deg til intervju, hva bør du trene på i forkant og hvem bør  du sette som din referanse? Dette kan vi og våre eksperter står klare til å møte deg.

Se våre tips og triks på www.adeccowaytowork.com eller www.adecco.no

title: CEO for One Month 2016 - Apply Today! adec.co/iamtheceo
description:
Be the CEO! Okay, so while you don’t technically get a permanent “CEO” title, we do offer you the next best thing – the opportunity to work as CEO for one month alongside Adecco Group North America CEO Bob Crouch. 

As the winner you'll travel (on our dime) and will collaborate with leaders across the United States. You’ll receive food, housing, and $10,000 for your services! Where else will you get to see how a Fortune Global 500 company is run from the top down?

But this opportunity doesn’t stop there. After your internship with Adecco Group North America, you’ll be eligible to follow up this internship and be our global CEO for One Month in Zurich, Switzerland! 

To start your application today, go to: adec.co/iamtheceo

title: The next CEO of Adecco 2013
description:
In order to attract the brightest students we offer the best job we have - the position as the Chief Executive Officer of Adecco. This year we had a headhunter process and there was 1700 highly ambitious students that applied for the job. The engagement i social channels was huge. Assad Abbas was the winner this year, and in 2014 it can be your turn! In the meantime, follow Adecco Student on Facebook for more information: www.facebook.com/AdeccoStudent. 

For å tiltrekke oss de beste studentene i Norge, tilbyr vi hvert år en student sommerjobben som konsernsjef i Adecco. I år var det en storstilt hodejeger prosess for å finne den beste kandidaten. 1700 studenter søkte på jobben og svært mange markerte seg sterkt i prosessen. Det var studenten Assad Abbas som til slutt stod igjen som vinner i år, kanskje er det du som imponerer oss i 2014 og får tidenes sommerjobb? Følg Adecco Student på Facebook for mer informasjon: www.facebook.com/AdeccoStudent

title: Buswerbung in Baden
description: Buswerbung in Baden zahlt sich aus. Baden ist eine bezaubernde Stadt direkt an der Limmat, in unmittelbarer Nähe zu Zürich. Die grosse Altstadt, die Weite Gasse, die Parks und die Limmatpromenade laden mit vielen Geschäften, Restaurants und Cafés zum verweilen ein. Das Kasino ist in der ganzen Schweiz bekannt. Die Busse der RVBW fahren mitten ins Zentrum, verbinden umliegende Gemeinden und Quartiere mit der Stadt. Die Werbung auf den Bussen kommt an.

title: ABB Robotics - New Generation Workpiece Positioners
description:
When working on complex parts, or with complex processes like arc welding, 6 axis may just not be enough. For these situations ABB introduces a new generation of workpiece positioners which can be fully coordinated with the movement of ABB robots. They are designed to be easy to use & integrate and employ the same drives and software as the robots.
In this movie the IRBP R type positioner demonstrates its speed, accuracy and dexterity by coordinating motion with two IRB 1600ID arc welding robots using MultiMove. To find out more about ABB's new generation workpiece positioners link here: http://www.abb.com/product/us/9AAC100715.aspx?country=00

title: Cautious hiring continues in May US jobs report
description:
For the US Job Report by the numbers visit our blog: http://blog.adeccousa.com/cautious-hiring-continues-in-may-jobs-report/

Every month we aim to be your resource for workplace economic changes and trends. Take an in-depth look at the current state of the economy & employment as we break down the numbers, explore unemployment trends and take a closer look at hiring statistics.

This morning's Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS) employment report for the month of May showed positive job growth with the addition of 175,000 positions and a slight change in the unemployment rate to 7.6%.

As an employer or job seeker, how have you noticed these job reports affecting your bottom-line and prospect of employment?

title: Beyond Innovation: Entrepreneurial Pitfalls and How to Avoid Them
description:
There is no single path that leads an entrepreneur from a brilliant idea to a thriving business. Every story is unique. But there are a number of challenges that almost every founder will run into while building their business. From the threat of running out of capital to losing sight of what the competition is up to, Credit Suisse asked successful entrepreneurs how they dealt with common pitfalls during the Entrepreneurs Summit.

Man geniesst das Leben und nimmt sich Zeit für die wichtigen Dinge. Zentrale Lage, gut ausgebildete Fachkräfte und ein intakter Naherholungsraum - auch die Wirtschaftsregion Bern hat viel zu bieten. BERNMOBIL ist ein dynamisches, leistungsfähiges und kundenorientiertes Unternehmen, auf welches die Bevölkerung vertraut. Werbung auf Trams und Bussen ist gern gesehen.

title: Adecco Way to Work -- Min viktigste jobberfaring, Kirsti Methi
description:
Kirsti Methi, generalsekretær i Europabevegelsen, forteller om sin viktigste jobberfaring.

Adecco skal ut i gatene 30. april. Fra 09.30 til 16.30 vil vi gi deg gode råd om CV- og søknadsskriving, intervjutrening og du kan prøve deg i forskjellige yrkesrelaterte oppgaver. Du finner oss sentralt plassert i de største byene og de fleste av kontorene våre rundt omkring i landet vil ha åpen dag.

Ungdomsledigheten er på sitt høyeste i en generasjon. Den er dobbelt så høy som den generelle ledigheten både i Norge og i resten av Europa. Dette ønsker vi å gjøre noe med, og derfor vil hele Adecco Norge være ut i gatene denne dagen for å tilby vår hjelp.

Adecco Way to Work er et globalt initiativ for å bistå unge arbeidssøkere med å gjøre seg mer attraktive for arbeidsmarket. Vårt mål er å gi unge arbeidsledige verktøyene til å komme seg inn på arbeidsmarkedet -- hvordan skriver du CVen og søknadsbrev som skiller seg ut i mengden, hvordan bør du forberede deg til intervju, hva bør du trene på i forkant og hvem bør  du sette som din referanse din referanse? Dette kan vi og våre eksperter står klare til å møte deg.

Se våre tips og triks på www.adeccowaytowork.com eller www.adecco.no

Zurich Organhaftpflichtversicherung (D&O), Directors & Officers' Liability Insurance
description:
Zurich Organhaftpflichtversicherung (D&O): Die Verantwortungsträger von Gesellschaften setzen sich durch ihre Handlungen und Unterlassungen einer gesetzlichen Verantwortlichkeit aus. Da die daraus entstehende Haftpflicht persönlich ist, kann das Privatvermögen dieser Personen zum Ziel möglicher Klagen werden. Die Organhaftpflichtversicherung D&O (Directors & Officers Liability Insurance) von Zurich ist ein Schutz für das Privatvermögen von Personen mit Organfunktion.

For more information please visit us at: http://www.zurich.ch/site/de/com/sme/organ.html

title: 50 Jahre Adecco: Seit 20 Jahren eine von uns!
description:
Adecco feiert dieses Jahr sein 50-jähriges Bestehen in Deutschland. Das heißt, dass auch viele Kolleginnen und Kollegen Adecco seit vielen Jahren treu sind und bereits eigene Jubiläen bei Adecco gefeiert haben. Wir haben einige davon eingeladen, uns ihre Erfahrungen und Erlebnisse aus den vergangenen Jahren mitzuteilen. Die Ergebnisse haben wir mit Film und Ton eingefangen.

Erfahren Sie in diesem Video von Frau Seitz, was sich in den 20 Jahren alles geändert hat und was das Jubiläumsmotto „better together" für sie bedeutet.

Mehr zu dem Firmenjubiläum erfahren Sie auf unserer Webseite unter www.adecco.de/50jahre

title: Ascom - helping to improve patient satisfaction in Middle East, Africa and Turkey
description:
Ascom highlights their presence in the Middle East, Africa and Turkey region – how they are developing state-of-the-art integrated healthcare communication solutions for customers with an aim of being pioneered in the healthcare sector.
This video features Chief Operating Officer from Thumbay Hospital and Medeor 24/7 hospital’s Chief Nursing Executive – speaking of issues they’ve encountered by not having on-site communication solutions. They highlight the advantages of having a nurse call and mobility solution and the impact it has on their hospital – saving them time, energy, improving the efficiency of nursing care and in turn improving patient satisfaction.
With nurses being bombarded with alerts, notifications and issues continuously throughout the day, Ascom highlight how they are focusing on using smart technology to send the right information, to the right person, at the right time, at the right place, so the nurse can receive filtered alerts relevant for them.

title: Belimo ZIP Economizer
description:
ZIP Economizer puts you back on track for energy savings.
Until now, economizing solutions have left a lot of room for error. The ZIP gets efficiency strategies back on track with easy setup, automatic code change over temperatures, and superior troubleshooting capability.  Users know instantly when failures occur and the ZIP helps them quickly pinpoint the problem and address it. With the following features, the ZIP leaves nothing to chance:
• Easy-to-read Automotive Grade LCD Display:  Extremely simple to navigate, this display delivers clear live status information, easy setup, changes, and operating history.
• ZIP Code Patented Technology: By simply entering your US zip code, or Canadian postal code, the system will automatically recognize your climate zone and will set the high limit change over temperature providing automatic compliance. 
• Plug and Play: With its self-configuration, if it's not plugged into the economizer, you won't have to worry about setting it up.
• Acceptance Tests:  Integrated onboard test sequence that ensures effortless compliance with California Title 24, and verification of proper operation. 
• Fault Detection and Diagnostics (FDD):  Troubleshoot faults, initiates alarms, and reconfigures for best operation. 
• Onboard Information:  First and only economizer control that integrates onboard help for setup or troubleshooting.
• Modular Design:  Flexible design capable of adding remote communication and or energy savings strategies on the same footprint.

Learn more www.ZIPeconomizer.com

title: TEMS Pocket and your Android Smartwatch
description: Testing today’s complex mobile networks om site can be taxing, especially in  public environment and perhaps even at a live event bustling with people. Connecting TEMS Pocket to your Smartwatch lets you focus on the environment and perform your work in a less intrusive way. Select which events you’d like to be notified about, slip TEMS Pocket back into your pocket and wait for your Smartwatch to notify you as these events occur. Choose from a wide array of predefined events or unleash the power of TEMS Pocket’s custom event editor. TEMS Pocket uses the Android notification system which makes it compatible with the latest Samsung Gear, Pebble and other Android Smartwatches.

title: FOX615 - Communication solutions with unmatched performance
description:
ABB's FOX615 is the result of more than two decades spent developing optical multiplexers for utilities around the world. A multiplexer with integrated teleprotection, serving circuit-switched networks while offering full support for packet-based technologies – straddling both worlds, it offers an easy migration path to next-generation networking without sacrificing the dependability and reliability for which ABB is justifiably renowned. 
FOX615 – designed and rigorously tested for reliable performance in the substation environment.
Further information: http://new.abb.com/network-management/communication-networks/fox615

title: Stable electricity supply for isolated network on Canary Islands
description:
The electrical network of La Gomera, one of the smaller of the Canary Islands, is tiny and isolated. Integration of renewable energy sources has always been challenging for the stability of the energy supply. Thanks to ABB’s grid stabilization technology - PowerStoreTM - the network has overcome any instability issues and is now ready to integrate a higher degree of green energy sources with no interruptions.

Remote locations like islands may be rich in renewable energy sources, but the intermittent nature makes their integration into the power grid a challenge. ABB’s innovative microgrid solution includes grid stabilization technology - PowerStore - that enables high penetration of renewable power generation, and distributed control systems that provide intelligent power management and efficient hybrid power plant operation. 

http://new.abb.com/power-generation/microgrids-solutions

ABB has designed and delivered solutions for more than 80 microgrids worldwide, for a wide range of applications.

Kodiak Island produces more than 99% of its electricity from renewables. See what ABB can do for you.

http://new.abb.com/power-generation/microgrids-solutions 

ABB has designed and delivered solutions for more than 80 microgrids worldwide, for a wide range of applications.

title: Baloise Jobcast #6: Fashion-Tipps fürs Interview mit Imagecoach Isabelle Herzig
description:
Was trägt man beim Vorstellungsgespräch? Was sagen Farben über einen aus? Und wie kann ich durch Körpersprache einen guten Eindruck machen? Diese und weitere Fragen beantwortet Isabelle Herzig (http://www.imagecoaching.ch), langjähriger Imagecoach und Expertin für Business-Mode.

Helft ihr uns? 

Als blutjunger Podcast sind wir auf eure Feedback angewiesen. Was findet ihr gut? Was wünscht ihr euch? Hilf uns, indem du das Video und einen Kommentar abgebt!

SHOW NOTES

02:05: Ist eine Affinität für Mode notwendig für ein Vorstellungsgespräch?
Durch das Beachten von Grundregeln macht man sicher nichts falsch. Doch eine Affinität für Mode hilft einem Bewerber, aus der Masse hervorzustechen.

03:04: Wie antwortet ein Profi auf die Frage "Steht mir das?"
Ein Image-Profi achtet auf eine Reihe von Faktoren, die ein Gesamtbild ausmachen. Diese sind:
Farbe
Schnitt
Proportionen
Material
Muster
Acessoires
Gepflegheit von Kleider und Körper

04:26: Wie kann man bei einem Vorstellungsgespräch seinen eigenen Stil hervorheben?
Das Grundgefühl zählt und täuscht einen meist nicht. Wichtig ist, dass man sich nicht zu "laut" anzieht, also grosse Muster, zu viel Farbe und übermässigen Schmuck vermeidet.

05:13: Darf man trotzdem etwas tragen, das heraussticht (ein Highlight)?
Auf jeden Fall, damit zeigt man Persönlichkeit.

05:28: Wie viel eigenen Stil kann man dem beruflichen Umfeld zumuten?
Orientierung geben die Fragen "Wo gehe ich hin?", "Was ist meine Rolle?" und "Wie will ich wirken, was bewirken?".

06:30: Was sagen Farben über eine Person aus?
Jede Farbe hat eine Wirkung, die prinzipiell nicht negativ oder positiv ist. Die Frage ist, ob die Wirkung gewünscht ist. Schwarz wirkt edel und autoritär, ist aber nicht zugänglich und sollte daher mit hellen Farben aufgebrochen werden. Dunkelblau ist meist besser, alternativ auch dunkelgrau. Weiss und beige wirken zu luftig für den Business-Kontext.

09:34: Wie kann man als Frau im Berufsleben weiblich und gleichzeitig seriös wirken?
Der Schnitt kann Silhouette zeigen, darf aber auf keinen Fall eng sein. Beim Ausschnitt ist es essentiell, dass dieser nicht zu tief ist (Nummer Sicher: Eine Handbreit unter dem Schlüsselbein, nicht mehr).

10:52: Wie kann man als Mann wissen, wann Anzug und Krawatte im Vorstellungsgespräch angebracht sind, auch wenn die Abteilung sich locker kleidet?
Am besten erkundigt man sich bei jemandem, der die Branche oder Firma kennt. Es hängt auch vom Gesprächspartner ab. Eine Krawatte muss nicht immer die richtige Wahl sein, aber je höher die Verantwortund und je grösser der Kundenkontakt ist, desto angebrachter ist sie. Für den Notfall sollte man im Arbeitsalltag immer einen Blazer und eine Krawatte zur Hand haben.

12:49: Mit welche einfachen Tricks kann man sein Auftreten schnell verbessern?
Wenn es ganz schnell gehen soll, hilft meist nur die Körpersprache: Augenkontakt signalisieren Offenheit, genauso wie offene Hände mit sichtbaren Daumen und ein offener Blazer. Im Gespräch sich leicht nach vorne lehnen signalisiert Interesse. Ein guter Händedruck lässt sich trainieren - wenn er zu weich ist, Biezeps (nicht Handmuskeln) anspannen.

16:15: Soll man sein Umfeld nach Feedback fragen, wie man wirkt?
Ja, und die Freunde, die kein Blatt vor den Mund nehmen, sind dabei die besten Ratgeber.

17:04: Wo kann man mehr über Isabelle Herzig erfahren?
http://www.imagecoaching.ch
https://www.facebook.com/imagecoaching/

title: Baloise Jobcast #7: 11 wichtige Tipps für die Vorbereitung aufs Vorstellungsgespräch
description:
Ein Vorstellungsgespräch ist ein ein "Moment der Wahrheit", an dem sich für Kandidat und Unternehmung zeigt, ob man füreinander gemacht ist. Damit diese nicht zu einer Stresssituation werden, ist eine gute Vorbereitung sehr wichtig. Aber wie bereitet man sich am besten vor? Der Baloise Jobcast präsentiert dir 11 Dinge, die du vor dem Vorstellungsgespräch unbedingt tun solltest.

1. Recherchiere die Unternehmung
Informiere dich über verschiedene Quellen über die Unternehmung, angefangen bei der Homepage (nicht bloss den Bewerber-Teil, sondern auch die Firmen- und Kundenseiten), Social Media-Kanäle sowie Portale für Unternehmensbewertungen (z.B. Kununu, Glassdoor). Wenn möglich, sprich mit jemandem, der die Firma aus eigener Erfahrung kennt.

2. Finde mehr über deine Gesprächspartner heraus
Je mehr dass du über deine Gesprächspartner im Vorstellungsgespräch weisst, desto besser kannst du dich in die Situation hineinversetzen, desto mehr findest du Gemeinsamkeiten mit dir und desto leichter fällt dir die Gesprächsführung. Nutze Google, LinkedIn, XING, um dir deine(n) Gegenüber besser vorstellen zu können und erwarte, dass man dich ebenfalls recherchiert.

3. Überleg dir, wer was erwartet
Was glaubt dein Gesprächspartner, wer da zum Interview erscheint, und was möchte er gerne erreichen? Und was erwartest du von deinem Gesprächspartner?

4. Bereite die wichtigsten Fragen vor
In Interviews geht es vor allem darum, dir Fragen zu stellen. Darum solltest du deine Antworten auf die "Klassiker" vorbereiten. Dazu gehören: 1) Erzählen Sie mir von sich!, 2) Warum möchten Sie bei uns arbeiten? 3) Was sind Ihre Stärken, was sind Ihre Schwächen? 4) Welche Fragen haben Sie noch an uns. Auf unserem Blog findest du eine Reihe von Artikeln zu verschiedenen Interviewfragen: https://baloisejobs.com/tipps-tricks/interview

5. Schreib dir Erfolgstories auf
Viele Interviewer werden konkret nach Situationen fragen, in welchen du etwas besonderes erlebt hast, oder in denen du dich beweisen konntest. Darauf kannst du dich vorbereiten. Frage dich, worauf du besonders stolz bist, und welche Hindernisse oder Schwierigkeiten hast du schon überwunden hast. Am besten beziehen sich die Erfolgsgeschichten auf deine Berufserfahrung. Schreib dir für jede Geschichte auf, WAS die Situation war, WIE du dich verhalten hast und WARUM sie ein Erfolg war.

6. Üben, üben, üben!
Mit dem Vorbereiten stecken die Antworten in deinem Kopf, aber noch nicht auf der Zunge. Darum solltest du das Interview üben, indem du es alleine oder, noch besser, mit jemand anderem durchspielst. Stelle dir dabei die Gesprächssituation und die Person vor. Du kannst deine wichtigsten Fragen und Antworten auch aufnehmen und abhören.

7. Bereite etwas Nützliches vor
Übertreffe die Erwartungen deiner Interviewpartner, indem du etwas Nützliches mit Bezug zum beworbenen Job mitbringst - eine Idee, die du dir überlegt hast, eine Erkenntnis, die du gewonnen hast, oder eine kleine Arbeit, die zeigt, was du drauf hast.

8. Plane deinen Look
Überleg dir, welche Kleider du anziehst und wie du wirken möchtest. Unsere Folge 6 "Fashion-Tipps fürs Interview" gibt dir weitere Tipps dazu: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TCRWaa2-BCI - Von einem kompletten Look-Change solltest du absehen. Falls du dir die Haare schneiden lässt, gib dir ein paar Tage Zeit, um dich an die neue Frisur zu gewöhnen.

9. Plane deine Anfahrt
Nichts ist so peinlich, wie gut vorbereitet doch zu spät an ein Vorstellungsgespräch zu erscheinen. Darum plane lieber 20 Minuten mehr ein, nimm einen Zug früher und sei rechtzeitig da. Aber: Melde dich nicht überpünktlich am Schalter.

10. Abschalten und früh ins Bett gehen
Ausgeruht ist man am entspanntesten - das ist wichtig für einen guten erster Eindruck. Darum solltest du dein Interview nicht bis in die Nacht vorbereiten, sondern frühzeitig abschalten und dir Zeit für dich nehmen.

11. Sei dein bestes Selbst
Du bist, wer du bist - und das ist gut so. Darum sei dich selbst, verstell dich nicht, und zeige dich von deiner motiviertesten Schokoladenseite.

Ganz viele weitere Tipps zum Vorstellungsgespräch findest du in unserem Blog unter Tipps & Tricks - Interview: https://baloisejobs.com/tipps-tricks/interview

Welche Tipps hast du fürs Vorstellungsgespräch? Welche anderen Themen sollten wir unbedingt behandeln? Schreib uns einen Kommentar oder bewerte uns!

title: Adecco (Senior) Consultant
description:
Als consultant of senior consultant werk je in een team en rapporteer je aan de branch manager. Je biedt een kwaliteitsvol antwoord op de noden van klanten en kandidaten. Als senior consultant heb je bovendien veel aandacht voor de commerciële objectieven van je kantoor.

Un consultant / senior consultant (h/f) est un joueur d'équipe. Tu rapporteras au branch manger. Un sérvice qualitatif sera ton but, pour tes clients, mais aussi pour tes candidats. Comme senior consultant tu devras bien faire attention aux objectifs commerciaux de l'agence.

title: Adecco Branch Manager
description:
Je bent verantwoordelijk voor één van onze kantoren en stuurt een team van consultants aan. Als manager zorg je ervoor dat je kantoor uitstekend draait en dat de klanten uitermate tevreden zijn. Commerciële contacten aanknopen en uitdiepen wordt één van je kerntaken.

Tu es le/la responsable d'une de nos agences et le/la coach d'une équipe de consultants. Comme responsable c'est à toi d'optimaliser l'éfficacité de l'agence et de garder tes clients satisfaits. La recherche de nouvelles possibilités commerciales sera une tâche essentielle.

title: CLX.NovaBusiness - Finanzmanagement: Einfach, sicher, schnell.
description:
CLX.NovaBusiness ist die ideale und sichere Lösung für den Zahlungsverkehr und für ein effizientes Cash-Management. Die Multi-Banking-Fähigkeit erlaubt hierbei eine lückenlose elektronische Kommunikation mit Ihren verschiedenen Finanzinstituten.

Erfassen Sie Ihre Zahlungen direkt in CLX.NovaBusiness oder übernehmen Sie diese von einem Drittsystem. Kontrollieren und signieren Sie die Zahlungen und geben Sie diese sogar unterwegs sicher frei – nach Ihren selbst definierten Freigaberegeln. CLX.NovaBusiness ist eine beliebig skalierbare Lösung, mit der Sie Ihre Firmenliquidität jederzeit und überall unter Kontrolle haben.

Klare Vorteile gegenüber Ihrer heutigen Lösung – mit CLX.NovaBusiness haben Sie mehr Komfort und sparen zudem viel Zeit und Geld!

title: กะเทาะเปลือกเด็กจบใหม่ ค้นพบศักยภาพที่ใช่ ได้งานที่ชอบ ครั้งที่ 2 กับอเด็คโก้
description:
กลุ่มบริษัทอเด็คโก้ประเทศไทยรวมทีมมือโปรมาให้คำปรึกษากับน้องๆ ให้ได้รู้จักตัวเอง ค้นหาศักยภาพที่ซ่อนอยู่ ดึงความเด่น ความชอบ และความถนัดของตัวเองออกมา เพื่อก้าวเข้าสู่โลกของการทำงานอย่างมีความสุข และได้ทำงานในสิ่งที่รัก พบกับแขกรับเชิญที่จะมาพูดถึงประสบการร์การทำงานในชีวิตจริง การนำความรู้และทักษะจากสิ่งที่เรียนมาประยุกต์ใช้ในสไตล์ของแต่ละคน วิธีทำให้เราสนุกกับการทำงาน และแสดงศักยภาพของตนเองออกมา 

นอกจากนี้ยังมีทีมที่ปรึกษาจากกลุ่มบริษัทอเด็คโก้ประเทศไทยมาแนะนำเทคนิคที่ช่วยให้เรซูเม่ของคุณเด่นพอที่นายจ้างจะหยิบขึ้นมาพิจารณา และแบ่งปันเคล็ดลับในการสัมภาษณ์งานที่ช่วยให้ผู้สัมภาษณ์ทราบจุดเด่นของคุณอย่างง่ายดาย

วันกิจกรรม: วันที่ 30 เมษายน 2557
เวลา: 09.30 -- 16.00 น.
สถานที่: ห้องกรุงเทพ ชั้น 9 โรงแรมแลนด์มาร์ค 138 ถ. สุขุมวิท กรุงเทพฯ

ลงทะเบียนเข้าร่วมกิจกรรม http://bit.ly/1pLXIyr ( 200 ท่านแรก รับของที่ละรึกจากอเด็คโก้)

title: Harlem Shake (Adecco Belgium edition feat. Hans van Alphen)
description:
De medewerkers van Adecco Group Belgium waren zo blij om nu ook als Beste Werkgever door het leven te gaan dat ze het niet konden laten om ook hun versie van de Harlem Shake te brengen. Uiteraard mocht Hans van Alphen als ambassadeur van het Attitude & Coaching programma niet ontbreken.

Les collaborateurs d'Adecco Group Belgium étaient tellement contents avec leur titre de Meilleur Employeur de Belgique qu'ils se sont mis à dancer leur version du Harlem Shake.
Bien évidemment, Hans van Alphen, l'ambassadeur du programme Attitude et Coaching d'Adecco ne pouvait pas manquer à l'appel.

title: ABB’s proven 4-pole synchronous motors now available in power range up to 75 MW
description:
ABB’s proven 4-pole synchronous motor platform is ideal for high power applications. With its solid salient pole rotor it provides high efficiency, low noise and vibration, and excellent thermal and mechanical stability.

In heavy industry, the size and power requirements for motors are continuously rising. ABB is meeting these needs by extending the available power of its 4-pole synchronous range up to 75 MW.

For more information, please visit http://new.abb.com/motors-generators/synchronous-motors

title: Apprendistato di Alta Formazione: trovare lavoro prima della laurea. La storia di Michele
description: Michele, 25 anni, studia Ingegneria all'Università di Bergamo. Ancora prima di laurearsi è entrato nel mondo del lavoro attraverso un Apprendistato di Alta Formazione del progetto #diamolavoroalleambizioni di Adecco Italia. Così, a qualche mese dalla laurea, ha avuto modo di imparare molto sul campo, nel settore meccanico, portando avanti sia studio che lavoro e iniziando a costruire la propria carriera.

Viel Spass beim Reinhören!
Timm & Kim

title: Higher powers for steam and gas turbines with ABB generators up to 85 MVA
description:
ABB expands the proven AMS product family to cover the outputs in the 60 – 80 MVA range.

ABB’s advanced 4-pole technology has made it possible to increase not only maximum power levels but also 
the power when de-rating is needed, such as high power applications in hot environments.

Compared to 2-pole, the 4-pole solution enables OEMs to freely select the speed range to optimize the turbine design for the lowest cost and highest system efficiency. 

With a track record of over 50,000 MVA in large 4-pole generators supplied all over the world, ABB can deliver the optimum solution on time and in budget. 

For more information, visit http://new.abb.com/motors-generators/generators/generators-for-steam-and-gas-turbines

title: ABB’s traction generators for diesel-electric locomotives
description:
As the rail freight transportation is growing, ABB expands its new compact, high performance generators to cover powers from 1 to over 3 MW with efficiencies up to 96,9 %. ABB’s robust traction generator family presents a unique rotor design which is extremely vibration resistant. The innovative construction (even in single-bearing arrangement) can withstand the higher torsional vibrations of the shaft line induced by new high compression engines. This enables locomotive builders to minimize the space requirement and increases the genset maintenance interval, offering a long and trouble-free operating life.

For more information about the ABB traction generators, please visit  http://new.abb.com/motors-generators/traction-motors-and-generators/traction-generators

title: Adecco Way To Work: Australian winner visits Thailand
description:
Experiencing the world of work.

With the Adecco Way to Work program Adecco wants to offer our time, expertise, professional skills and training tools to help young people to make their first job experiences.

The contest has made it possible for nine lucky individuals to experience different vocations all around the world during this summer. 

Rocheleh Ziffer from Australia, one of our Adecco Way To Way winners, has an opportunity to gain the unforgettable job experience about the art of Thai boxing to be a Muay Thai trainer at Khongsittha boxing camp. 

Watch the video to see how she enjoys this one-day experience. For more information, visit www.adecco.co.th or http://rocheleh.adeccoworkexperiencecontest.com.

title: Innovazione, come portarla nell'azienda di famiglia. La testimonianza di Daniele e Luca
description: Daniele e Luca hanno rilevato l'azienda di famigla, Sidip World, nel settore pulizie e servizi, e la stanno innovando a livello digitale e tecnologico. In che modo? Dall'analisi del traffico web a quella delle vendite online, fino all'uso dei social. I questo video, i consigli per chi, dopo la scuola, si affaccia al mondo del lavoro e sta scegliendo la propria strada professionale.

title: Spring : révélez votre esprit startup
description:
Rejoignez Spring, le cabinet de recrutement spécialisé CDI CDD Intérim du groupe Adecco. 

Spring compte aujourd’hui 270 consultants sur ses 11 lignes de spécialisation.

Rencontrez Pierre Fallion, directeur général de Spring en France. Son message : « soyez curieux et ambitieux ! »

title: Trovare lavoro, quali prospettive dopo gli studi?

title: Adecco rekruteert voor Fabricom - werfleider (M/V)
description:
De projecten van Fabricom zijn niet van de minsten: zij zijn dé Belgische referentie in innovatieve technische installaties en diensten voor industriële, energiegerelateerde, tertiaire en infrastructurele markten. In België en internationaal. 

Hun expertise omvat een brede waaier technische disciplines zoals Electrical, Instrumentation, Mechanical, Industrial Piping, Automation en Maintenance. Toch ben je geen nummer tussen je 4900 collega's. 

We zijn dringend op zoek naar volgende collega's M/V

Aansluiters Elektriciteit & Gas (M/V) - Regio Aalst / Ninove
Kraanman monteur met rijbewijs C (M/V) - Regio Oost-Vlaanderen
Elektriciens Residentieel/Industrieel (M/V) - Antwerpen en Oost-Vlaanderen
Elektriciens Residentieel/Industrieel (M/v) - Vlaams-Brabant & Limburg

CAD Tekenaar (M/V) - Aartselaar

title: O întrebare...
description:
Salutare tuturor,

Clip-ul de față reprezintă interfața video a campaniei Adecco: România are nevoie de experți. Ideea a fost simplă: am pus o singură întrebare la un număr cât mai mare de persoane din medii cât mai diverse (vă lasăm să descoperiți singuri întrebarea).

Video-ul este un creuzet de păreri care ne alimentează campania de recrutare de experți pentru evaluarea și sprijinirea proiectelor cu finanțare europeană 2013 - 2015.

Campania a debutat pe pagina Adecco România de Facebook cu un mic sondaj. Cu această ocazie le mulțumim tuturor persoanelor care au votat și care și-au exprimat opiniile pe pagina de Facebook.

Sperăm să vă placă rezultatul și dacă doriți vă invităm să îl distribuiți prietenilor și cunoscuților.

Enjoy!

title: Zaštita od provala
description: Jednostavno sigurni - sve što činimo usmjereno je na sigurnost jer znamo kako zdravi osjećaj sigurnosti poboljšava kvalitetu života. Naše kontinuirano pozicioniranje kao pružatelja sigurnosti dodatno smo učvrstili našom filozofijom Svijet sigurnosti. Koncept „Svijet sigurnosti" osigurava klijentima pomoć u sprečavanju mogućih šteta, a ako se šteta ipak dogodi, Basler osiguranje Zagreb djeluje odmah, brzo i stručno, s ciljem otklanjanja i umanjenja nastalih štetnih posljedica. www.basler-oz.hr

title: Les balais de l'opéra
description:
Ce court métrage a obtenu le prix "Halte aux idées reçues sur les métiers" remis le 12 mai 2011 par Thierry de Courtilles, Directeur Général d'Adia et membre du Comité Exécutif de la Fondation Groupe Adecco.

Plébiscitée en avril dernier par les collaborateurs du Groupe Adecco, et réalisée par 4 lycéens de l'EREA Joan Miro de Perpignan, cette vidéo s'attaque aux préjugés liés aux métiers du nettoyage. 
Thierry De Courtilles a félicité les gagnants pour leur vision du monde professionnel, allant au-delà des stéréotypes : « Nous sommes fiers d'avoir permis aux jeunes de se rapprocher du monde professionnel et, au travers d'une activité aussi technique que ludique qu'est le tournage d'un film, d'apprendre à mieux connaitre puis dépasser les stéréotypes et à priori liés aux métiers du nettoyage».

title: Adecco Way to Work - Min viktigste jobberfaring, Anne-Bjørg Wangensteen
description:
Anne-Bjørg Wangensteen, Markedssjef LSK kvinner forteller om sin viktigste jobberfaring.

Adecco skal ut i gatene 30. april. Fra 09.30 til 16.30 vil vi gi deg gode råd om CV- og søknadsskriving, intervjutrening og du kan prøve deg i forskjellige yrkesrelaterte oppgaver. Du finner oss sentralt plassert i de største byene og de fleste av kontorene våre rundt omkring i landet vil ha åpen dag.

Ungdomsledigheten er på sitt høyeste i en generasjon. Den er dobbelt så høy som den generelle ledigheten både i Norge og i resten av Europa. Dette ønsker vi å gjøre noe med, og derfor vil hele Adecco Norge være ut i gatene denne dagen for å tilby vår hjelp.

Adecco Way to Work er et globalt initiativ for å bistå unge arbeidssøkere med å gjøre seg mer attraktive for arbeidsmarket. Vårt mål er å gi unge arbeidsledige verktøyene til å komme seg inn på arbeidsmarkedet -- hvordan skriver du CVen og søknadsbrev som skiller seg ut i mengden, hvordan bør du forberede deg til intervju, hva bør du trene på i forkant og hvem bør  du sette som din referanse? Dette kan vi og våre eksperter står klare til å møte deg.

Se våre tips og triks på www.adeccowaytowork.com eller www.adecco.no

description:

Adecco skal ut i gatene 30. april. Fra 09.30 til 16.30 vil vi gi deg gode råd om CV- og søknadsskriving, intervjutrening og du kan prøve deg i forskjellige yrkesrelaterte oppgaver. Du finner oss sentralt plassert i de største byene og de fleste av kontorene våre rundt omkring i landet vil ha åpen dag.

Ungdomsledigheten er på sitt høyeste i en generasjon. Den er dobbelt så høy som den generelle ledigheten både i Norge og i resten av Europa. Dette ønsker vi å gjøre noe med, og derfor vil hele Adecco Norge være ut i gatene denne dagen for å tilby vår hjelp.

Adecco Way to Work er et globalt initiativ for å bistå unge arbeidssøkere med å gjøre seg mer attraktive for arbeidsmarket. Vårt mål er å gi unge arbeidsledige verktøyene til å komme seg inn på arbeidsmarkedet -- hvordan skriver du CVen og søknadsbrev som skiller seg ut i mengden, hvordan bør du forberede deg til intervju, hva bør du trene på i forkant og hvem bør  du sette som din referanse? Dette kan vi og våre eksperter står klare til å møte deg.

Se våre tips og triks på www.adeccowaytowork.com eller www.adecco.no

title: Landing a Dream Job After College Graduation
description:
Today's graduates are facing some of the toughest economic issues ever seen. Jobs are hard to find, majors are hard to choose.

Stepping out into the real-world can be scary and knowing where and whom to turn on to land a job after graduation shouldn't be. 

Adecco doesn't just find you a job, we give you the tools, support and experience you need to form the foundation of a successful future. That's exactly what we did for Kevin Miller, and we'd like to introduce you to him now.

title: Rekrutteringsprosessen til konsernsjefen 2011 - assessment centre
description:
Få et innblikk i rekrutteringsprosessen til sommerjobben som konsernsjef 2011. Fra 2300 søkere til en vinner.  Her vil du få innblikk i hele prosessen fra tester, intervju til finaledagen med assessment centre. Hovedvekten av filmen er fra finaledagen med åpent assessment centre, 8. juni 2011. Du vil få et unikt innblikk i hva et assessment centre egentlig er, oppgavene som ble gitt og hvordan de 4 finalekandidatene gjorde det - Kasper Hansen, Christopher Hoftun, Kjetil Kriken og Kine Stirler Alm. 

Vi gratulerer Kine Stirler Alm som stod igjen som vinner av sommerjobben som Konsernsjef hos Adecco i august 2011. Følg Kine sin blogg på www.blogg.konsernsjefen.no

title: Buswerbung in Aarau
description: Buswerbung in Aarau lohnt sich. Die pulsierende Kantons-Hauptstadt ist Anziehungspunkt für vielerlei Aktivitäten: Shopping, Ausgehen, Kultur, Kunst, Architektur, Geschichte. Auch kulinarisch hat die schöne Altstadt viel zu bieten: Kunsthaus, moderner Bahnhof mit der grössten Bahnhofsuhr der Schweiz, der Schachen, die gemütliche Altstadt mit zahlreichen Bistros - Aarau ist eine Reise wert! Die Busse der BBA fahren zuverlässig durch die Gassen. Werbung auf den Bussen ist beliebt.

title: Bus- und Tramwerbung in Zürich
description: Bus- und Tramwerbung in Zürich ist einzigartig. Als Metropole am Wasser bietet Zürich den einzigartigen Mix aus Wirtschaft, Erlebnis, Genuss, Natur und Kultur. Zürich gewinnt damit in internationalen Städterankings regelmässig Spitzenplätze. Die Verkehrsbetriebe Zürich (VBZ) sind der grösste städtische Verkehrsbetrieb der Schweiz. Wo die Fahrzeuge der VBZ Züri-Linie verkehren, da bewegen sich Menschen, da ist Leben und der Puls der Stadt. Werbung auf den Bussen und Trams sorgt für Schlagzeilen.

title: Lean Production
description: The Ascom d81 handset is not just the world's most robust handset. It is also a tool for Mission Critical Communications. This video highlights how the Ascom d81 is part of an automatic chain of responses to decrease the down time on a manned or unmmanned production process. Saving time, money and return to productivity.

title: Attack Alarm Prison
description: The Ascom d81 handset is not just the world's most robust handset. It is also a tool for Mission Critical Communications. This video highlights how the phone performs such a duty in a scenario where a Prison Guard, or similar worker, in a hazardous workplace finds themselves in need of alarming and messaging service. With Pull-Cord, Man-Down, No-Movement, and Push Button Alarming, the d81 is equipped to handle a variety of Alarm types with positioning accuracy.

title: 50 Jahre Adecco: Seit 25 Jahren einer von uns!
description:
Adecco feiert dieses Jahr sein 50-jähriges Bestehen in Deutschland. Das heißt, dass auch viele Kolleginnen und Kollegen Adecco seit vielen Jahren treu sind und bereits eigene Jubiläen bei Adecco gefeiert haben. Wir haben einige davon eingeladen, uns ihre Erfahrungen und Erlebnisse aus den vergangenen Jahren mitzuteilen. Die Ergebnisse haben wir mit Film und Ton eingefangen.

Erfahren Sie in diesem Video von Klaus Kurzhals , was sich in den 25 Jahren alles geändert hat und was das Jubiläumsmotto „better together" für ihn bedeutet.

Mehr zu dem Firmenjubiläum erfahren Sie auf unserer Webseite unter www.adecco.de/50jahre

title: SHRM: Clearing the Picture, Tara Weiss Interview
See how social media is changing the way we communicate
description:
Zurich and Social Media - The rapid rise of social media has changed the way we communicate. Zurich Insurance Company Ltd (Zurich) sees the opportunities and is already successfully engaging with people through several different Social Media channels.

Yet the employee use of Social Media networking sites brings out challenges for Zurich which are addressed in Zurich's Social Media Guidelines.

Zurich has developed Social Media Guidelines to help employees make sensible decisions about their online interactions, provide clear direction on the importance of protecting Zurich's as well as their own reputation and finally to respect third party rights and further regulations.

Reference: Zurich Insurance Company Ltd, Social Media, Social media guidelines, Social networking, Social media use, Search, Digital, So simple, Because change happens, Zurich HelpPoint, Zurich insurance, Twitter, Facebook, LinkedIn, YouTube, Customer support, Communication, Online interaction, Reputation management, Zurich HelpPoint

title: Making of... Eine(r) von uns
description:
Dass unsere erfolgreiche Kampagne Eine(r) von uns vor allem durch unsere Kolleginnen und Kollegen lebt, ist schon am Slogan abzulesen. Dass es Spaß macht, eine(r) von uns zu sein, sieht man bei unserem Making of...-Video von unserem Frühlings-Shooting 2011.

Zusammen mit der Agentur Echtzeit haben unsere motivierten „Models" nicht nur professionelle Studioluft schnuppern dürfen, sondern erlebten hautnah, wie unsere Kampagne mit Leben gefüllt wird. Hinter Eine(r) von uns stehen die Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeitern bei Adecco und die kreative Vielfalt zeigt sich in jeder/jedem Einzelnen von Ihnen. Und das kann man hier sehen und hören. Bühne frei...

title: Adecco auf der women&work Karrieremesse 2013
description:
Zum zweiten Mal in Folge waren wir am 8. Juni 2013 als Hauptsponsor bei Deutschlands größtem Karriere-Event für Frauen im World Conference Center in Bonn dabei. Auch in diesem Jahr war der Messe-Kongress mit rund 6.000 Besucherinnen und knapp 100 Ausstellern sowie einem vielfältigen Programm ein voller Erfolg.

Im Kurzinterview mit der women&work geht Jennifer Stein, Vertriebsdirektorin Retail bei der Adecco Personaldienstleistungen GmbH, auf die Frage ein, wie die Arbeitswelt der Zukunft aussieht.

Mehr Information zu der Messebeteiligung erfahren Sie auf unserer Webseite: http://www.adecco.de/de-DE/ueber-adecco/mehr-von-uns/Pages/adecco-hauptsponsor-women-and-work-2013.aspx

title: The Internship of a lifetime: CEO for One Month - $10,000
description:
The internship of a lifetime and $10,000? Apply today for the opportunity to become our CEO for 1 Month!

To start your application today, go to: adec.co/iamtheceo

While you don’t technically get a permanent “CEO” title, we do offer you the next best thing – the opportunity to work alongside Adecco Group North America CEO Bob Crouch for an entire month. During this highly coveted internship the winner will collaborate with leaders across the United States. You’ll receive food, housing, and $10,000 for your services! Where else will you get to see how a Fortune Global 500 company is run from the top down?

But this opportunity doesn’t stop there. After your internship with Adecco Group North America, you’ll be eligible to follow up this internship and be our global CEO for One Month in Zurich, Switzerland!

title: Tu sais regarder du sport et travailler en même temps?
description:
La période d'inscription pour un job de vacances dans la Belgium House lors des Jeux Olympiques est terminée. Ne sois pas déçu (e). Adecco a encore bien d'autres jobs de vacances sympas à te proposer.
 
Tu n'es pas encore inscrit(e) dans la base de données étudiants d'Adecco ? Alors enregistre-toi sur http://etudiants.adecco.be/FR/. Si tu es déjà inscrit(e), découvre surhttp://bit.ly/KD3Ndj un premier aperçu de notre offre de jobs d'étudiant.

title: JOBshopthai.com (English Version)
description:
To serve today's economy, employers' demand, and Thai-speaking candidates, Adecco proudly launches its latest website, jobshopthai.com to provides an alternative channel for job seekers. Via jobshopthai.com, you can apply for many positions including PCs, BAs, receptionists, accountants, administrators, technicians, etc. The new website focuses on the Thai-speaking target group and provides user-friendly features as follow.

• All Thai-language communications.
• Easy application process and call back 
• Contact via Line Application
• Job seekers calendar
• Job application history with safety data protection system
• Updated job from leading companies

Jobs in jobshopthai.com includes permanent, outsources and temporary positions. Whether you are a newly graduated student or an experienced professional, you can register and apply for available jobs via www.jobshopthai.com.

title: We have our 10 finalists joining the CEO for One Month boot camp, Madrid
description:
34 talented Adecco Country CEO for One Month youngsters have been battling it out to earn their place at the #CEO1month boot camp in Madrid. Here they are!

title: La Boîte à Réponses #1JOB2BOSS n°1 : Clémence te dit pourquoi postuler
description:
Postule maintenant sur http://waytowork.fr/

Combien d'expériences peuvent vraiment changer ta vie ? Avec #1JOB2BOSS, deviens le bras droit du CEO du Groupe Adecco en France. 
Clémence Lemonnier, 24 ans et lauréate #1JOB2BOSS 2015, raconte dans ce premier épisode de la Boîte à Réponses ce qui l'a poussée à tenter l'aventure #1JOB2BOSS l'an dernier.

title: 2 Minutes with Tidarat : ตอน อยู่หรือไป อะไรสำคัญสุด (2/2)
description:
พบกันอีกครั้งกับคุณธิดารัตน์ กาญจนวัฒน์ ผู้อำนวยการส่วนภูมิภาค – ไทยและเวียดนาม กลุ่มบริษัทอเด็คโก้ประเทศไทยที่จะพูดถึงภาคต่อ ผลสำรวจปี2557 เรื่อง  "อยู่หรือไป อะไรสำคัญสุด?" ตอนที่ 2  โดยในครั้งนี้จะเสนอแนวทางการรักษาพนักงานในองค์กร และปัจจัยดึงดูดพนักงานที่มีความสามารถเข้าสู่องค์กร 

อ่านข้อมูลเพิ่มเติมได้ที่ http://bit.ly/1G4urt0

รับชมวิดีโอ"อยู่หรือไป อะไรสำคัญสุด?"ตอนที่ 1 ได้ที่ http://bit.ly/1B0hVLL

ทำความรู้จักและติดตามคุณธิดารัตน์ผ่านทาง Twitter: @t_kanchanawat

======================================

Tidarat Kanchanawat, Regional Director Thailand & Vietnam, Adecco Group Thailand continued on topic "Stay or Leave - What matters most?" Episode 2 which focus on how to retain as well as attract talent in organization.

title: Contratti a tempo indeterminato, le storie dei nostri lavoratori
description: Tre lavoratori Adecco assunti a tempo indeterminato raccontano la propria esperienza tra ingresso nel mondo del lavoro, crescita e valorizzazione professionale, raggiungimento delle proprie ambizioni.

title: Lianne Tan - Badminton - Way to Work 2016
description:
A badminton athlete is precise, flexible, persevering, fast and focused. All important qualities in the work space as well.

What are your strengths? And how will you use them to find a job?

Get the most out of your career and discover all our tips and tricks on www.adeccowaytowork.com.

Play your cards right and you might become our next #CEO1Month, apply here: http://adec.co/ceo1month-be












music by: www.bensound.com

title: Esiste ancora il mito del posto fisso? - Rai3, Buongiorno Regione
description:
Adecco è il primo datore di lavoro in Italia, con oltre 5000 assunti a tempo indeterminato nel 2015 e oltre 160mila persone assunte in somministrazione.
Ma cosa significa oggi “tempo indeterminato”? Cosa pensano gli italiani del “posto fisso” e quali ritengono essere le loro priorità quando si tratta di cercare lavoro? Ne parliamo con Andrea Malacrida, AD di Adecco Italia, a Buongiorno Regione su Rai 3 attraverso l'indagine Adecco su "Gli italiani e il lavoro a tempo indeterminato".

Adecco primo datore di lavoro degli italiani http://www.adecco.it/chi-siamo/default.aspx
Ricerca Adecco "Gli italiani e il lavoro a tempo indeterminato" http://www.adecco.it/chi-siamo/Pages/lavoro-tempo-indeterminato-italia.aspx

title: Baloise Jobcast #3: Autonome Teams in der IT
description:
140 Mitarbeiter, keine Chefs, Aufgaben selbst bestimmen und Zeit für eigene Projekte - wie geht denn das? In der dritten Folge des JobCast erzählen uns IT-Bereichsleiter Jürgen Bartels und Nicole Rupp, wie sich ihr Bereich agil und sympathisch mit der "Scrum"-Methode organisiert und welche neuen Teammitglieder sie gerade suchen.

Offene Stellen in Nicoles und Jürgens Bereich:

- Software Engineer Java: https://www.baloise.ch/de/ueber-uns/karriere/stellenangebote/jobdetail~job=000003Z5~lang=de~&src=CWS-11360

- Scrum Master: https://www.baloise.ch/de/ueber-uns/karriere/stellenangebote/jobdetail~job=000002WL~lang=de~&src=CWS-11360

- Release Manager (im Interview nicht erwähnt): https://www.baloise.ch/de/ueber-uns/karriere/stellenangebote/jobdetail~job=00000412~lang=de~&src=CWS-11360

title: Spring : la force d'un groupe international
description:
Rejoignez Spring !

Spring, cabinet de recrutement spécialisé en middle management du groupe Adecco, est implanté dans 11 pays en Asie (Malaisie, Corée du Sud, Chine, Japon, Taiwan, Singapour, Thaïlande) et 3 pays en Europe (Royaume-Uni, Espagne, France) avec 66 bureaux.

Nous sommes 556 collaborateurs. Et si vous étiez le prochain ?
Spring accélère votre carrière !

title: Découvrez le nouveau site du groupe Adecco France
description:
Nouveau site pour le groupe Adecco France ! 
Que vous cherchiez un emploi, ayez un projet de recrutement ou envie de rejoindre le groupe Adecco, visitez notre nouveau site : www.groupe-adecco.fr

Plus de 12 000 offres d'emploi en ligne pour nos candidats et des solutions RH dans tous les domaines du recrutement pour nos clients.

title: Mettersi in proprio, come avere successo? La storia di Bruno, imprenditore nella ristorazione
description: Dopo aver lavorato per molti anni in ambito Marketing&Sales all'interno di molte multinazionali, Bruno Alessi ha deciso di mettersi in proprio e avviare un'attività nel settore ristorazione. Nel video spiega offre consigli per diventare imprenditore, dai requisiti importanti alle doti di managerialità e intraprendenza.

title: #2 What to wear! Tips and tricks for getting ready for a job interview #2
description:
Mimi, our anchor for our CEO for One Month Series is here to give interview tips and tricks to the thousands of candidates that are going through the #CEO1month selection process right now! 

Stay tuned - more videos are on the way! In the meantime you can find more advice on our Career Centre https://www.adeccowaytowork.com/en/ca... 

Stay tuned for the whole #CEO1month series by subscribing to this YouTube channel! 

On June 24th we will announce the 34 lucky *CEOs for One month in the running to become Global *CEO for One Month of Adecco Group! 

Visit http://adec.co/6xxNQO for more information!

https://www.facebook.com/AdeccoWayToWork
https://twitter.com/AdeccoWayToWork

title: Adecco   CEO for One Month 2016
description: Wil jij kans maken op een uniek ervaring met Hans Pruis, CEO van Adecco Group Nederland? Wacht niet langer en reageer direct: http://www.adecco.nl/werknemers/websites/way-to-work/ceo_for_1_month/default.aspx

title: Adecco Athlete Career Programme - Belgium (short version)
description:
Adecco België, het Belgisch Olympisch en Interfederaal Comité (BOIC) en het Belgisch Paralympisch Comité (BPC) hebben hun krachten gebundeld om samen aan de Olympische, Paralympische en elitesporters het Athlete Career Programme aan te bieden.

Adecco Belgique, le Comité Olympique et Interfédéral Belge (COIB) et le Comité Paralympique Belge (CPB) ont uni leurs forces pouroffrir l'Athlete Career Programme aux athlètes olympiques, paralympiques et aux sportifs d'élite.

title: Kundenberater Basler Versicherungen Region Zofingen
description: Stefan Oppliger erzählt von den Herausforderungen seiner Arbeit als Kundenberater, was er daran schätzt und wieso er diesen Beruf mit Leidenschaft ausübt.

title: Come trovare lavoro: le skill su cui puntare - Spirito di squadra
description:

La serie di video pillole "Come trovare lavoro: le skill su cui puntare" prende le mosse dal Lip Dub, una delle prove sostenute dagli aspiranti candidati al progetto Adecco CEO for One Month.

La serie di video pillole "Come trovare lavoro: le skill su cui puntare" prende le mosse dalle prove sostenute dagli aspiranti candidati al progetto  Adecco CEO for One Month mettendo in evidenza gli aspetti utili per chi cerca lavoro, che attraverso questi video può trarre consigli pratici per relazionarsi al meglio con HR e referenti aziendali.

title: How to Introduce yourself in Japanese
description:
Step:1 Introduce your name
- If Japanese native, the candidate should say his/her both surname & name. However, Thai candidates' name/surname may be difficult for Japanese.
- If you feel your name is long or difficult, you can say only name. Or, let's introduce your nick name together.

Example :
私はシリンヤ（スプブンラード）と申します。
My name is Sirinya.


Step:2 Describe your educational background / work experience
- If you have an interview with Japanese, let's introduce why you are interested in Japan/ Japanese language, how long and where you studied Japanese. Let's introduce not only position name but also the brief of Job Description.
- If you can say with tip or lesson what you learnt from the job, it may be very impressive.
For example, I got to know "HOU-REN-SOU" was very important for Japanese business etc.

Example :
私は、タイでの日本企業の活躍に興味を持ち、
大学では、アサンプションでビジネス日本語を専攻しましたが、
生きた日本語を勉強するため、また日本の文化を直接体験するために
大学卒業後1年間、東京の日本語学校に留学しました。

帰国後、日系メーカーで通訳として働き、材料に関する翻訳もしました。
通訳は言葉だけではなく、色々な知識が必要と感じ、
現在、アサンプション大学の大学院で経営学を勉強しています。

I was interested in the activity of Japanese company in Thailand and majored in Business Japanese at Asamption University. After graduated from University, I went to Japan and studied living Japanese language and the culture at Japanese Language School in Tokyo.

After coming back to Thailand, I worked for Japanese Manufacturing company as an interpreter between Japanese Manager and Thai staff and translation about material was also my task.
Then I felt interpreter needed not only language skill but also a lot of knowledge. Therefore, now I study Business Administration at Graduate School of Assumption University.

帰国後、日系メーカーで通訳として働き、材料に関する翻訳もしました。
通訳は言葉だけではなく、色々な知識が必要と感じ、
現在、アサンプション大学の大学院で経営学を勉強しています。

帰国後、日系メーカーで通訳として働き、材料に関する翻訳もしました。
通訳は言葉だけではなく、色々な知識が必要と感じ、
現在、アサンプション大学の大学院で経営学を勉強しています。


Step:3 Describe your strong point and weak point
- Let's illustrate with examples or the reason why you think it's your strong/weak point.
About the weak point, you should prepare a measure for overcoming.
(It shows you can take objective view and logical thinking.)

Example :
私の長所は、フレンドリーなところで、友達がたくさんいます。
職場でも、周りの人といい関係を作って助け合って仕事をしています。
My strong point is friendly character and I have a lot of friend.
I make a good relationship with my colleague or boss and work helping each other at office, too.

短所は、細かいことを気にして時間がかかることですが、
バランスを考えて仕事が遅れないように注意しています。
My weak point may be to pay attention too much. But I always try to keep balance not to late for deadline on my job.


Step:4 Describe your prospective career / the reason why you apply for the position
- Interviewers would like to know about this point to check your motivation.
Let's describe the reason why you apply connecting with your dream or aim.

これまで学んだ日本語やビジネスの知識をもっと仕事で活かそうと思い、
日本語を使いながらマーケティングや企画ができる御社に興味を持ち応募しました。
I would like to utilize my Japanese language skill and knowledge and experience in Business for the position.
Therefore, I apply for the position.


よろしくお願いします。
Thank you

title: Adecco Way to Work - Min viktigste jobberfaring, Malin (22 år)
description:
Malin (22 år), Lærerstudent ved Høgskulen i Sogn og Fjordane, forteller om sin viktigste jobberfaring.

Adecco skal ut i gatene 30. april. Fra 09.30 til 16.30 vil vi gi deg gode råd om CV- og søknadsskriving, intervjutrening og du kan prøve deg i forskjellige yrkesrelaterte oppgaver. Du finner oss sentralt plassert i de største byene og de fleste av kontorene våre rundt omkring i landet vil ha åpen dag.

Ungdomsledigheten er på sitt høyeste i en generasjon. Den er dobbelt så høy som den generelle ledigheten både i Norge og i resten av Europa. Dette ønsker vi å gjøre noe med, og derfor vil hele Adecco Norge være ut i gatene denne dagen for å tilby vår hjelp.

Adecco Way to Work er et globalt initiativ for å bistå unge arbeidssøkere med å gjøre seg mer attraktive for arbeidsmarket. Vårt mål er å gi unge arbeidsledige verktøyene til å komme seg inn på arbeidsmarkedet -- hvordan skriver du CVen og søknadsbrev som skiller seg ut i mengden, hvordan bør du forberede deg til intervju, hva bør du trene på i forkant og hvem bør  du sette som din referanse? Dette kan vi og våre eksperter står klare til å møte deg.

Se våre tips og triks på www.adeccowaytowork.com eller www.adecco.no

title: Adecco Way to Work - Min viktigste jobberfaring, Katarina Mathisen
description:
Katarina Mathisen, Webmaster Adecco, forteller om sin viktigste jobberfaring.

Adecco skal ut i gatene 30. april. Fra 09.30 til 16.30 vil vi gi deg gode råd om CV- og søknadsskriving, intervjutrening og du kan prøve deg i forskjellige yrkesrelaterte oppgaver. Du finner oss sentralt plassert i de største byene og de fleste av kontorene våre rundt omkring i landet vil ha åpen dag.

Ungdomsledigheten er på sitt høyeste i en generasjon. Den er dobbelt så høy som den generelle ledigheten både i Norge og i resten av Europa. Dette ønsker vi å gjøre noe med, og derfor vil hele Adecco Norge være ut i gatene denne dagen for å tilby vår hjelp.

Adecco Way to Work er et globalt initiativ for å bistå unge arbeidssøkere med å gjøre seg mer attraktive for arbeidsmarket. Vårt mål er å gi unge arbeidsledige verktøyene til å komme seg inn på arbeidsmarkedet -- hvordan skriver du CVen og søknadsbrev som skiller seg ut i mengden, hvordan bør du forberede deg til intervju, hva bør du trene på i forkant og hvem bør  du sette som din referanse? Dette kan vi og våre eksperter står klare til å møte deg.

Se våre tips og triks på www.adeccowaytowork.com eller www.adecco.no

title: ABB Robotics - 10 good reasons to invest in robots
description:
Robots have been proven to deliver a host of benefits in a wide variety of applications. Manufacturers introducing robots to their production processes have typically seen a significant transformation in their productivity and efficiency. 

The International Federation of Robotics recently undertook a survey that identified the top 10 reasons that manufacturers invest in robots. ABB has now built on that survey and developed a Guide to help you better understand the "10 good reasons for investing in robots" with real-life case studies from companies and integrators who exemplify each one of the reasons. 

The 10 good reasons range from reducing operating costs, improving product quality and consistency, as well as the quality of work for employees, to increasing production output rates, product manufacturing flexibility and reducing material waste and increasing yield.

description:

For the Driver: Data Collection for Non-experts
Reduce the complexity and training required to perform drive testing. Purpose-built user interface for speed, simplicity and reliability when collecting data with TEMS Investigation.

For the Engineer: Remote Access to Collected Data & Analytics
Remotely support drive test projects with web access to analysis of drive test data through TEMS Discovery KPI dashboards. Single-click access to relevant logfiles needed for deeper analysis and troubleshooting.
