title: Chronic Myeloid Leukaemia Journey
description:
Chronic Myeloid Leukaemia (CML) has changed beyond recognition over the past 50 years. Once a fatal cancer, today it has become a chronic condition with patients able to expect a normal lifespan. As part of our What if? What now? campaign, this is the first in a series of animated videos. This animation maps out the key clinical milestones over the last few years. Importantly, it also explores what patients may be able to expect in the future as treatment continues to evolve.

©Novartis 2014

title: TSC Common Threads: The Grandia Family
description: TSC, or tuberous sclerosis complex, affects each person differently and manifestations can change over time, but most share TSC genetic threads in common. Symptoms associated with TSC can include non-cancerous tumors in vital organs, cognitive delays, epilepsy and autism. To raise awareness of TSC and share stories from courageous individuals impacted by this rare genetic disease, Novartis created the TSC Common Threads video series – this is the fourth of six videos.

title: Patient-centered tuberculosis treatment - Training video - Swahili
description: Utaratibu wa kumpa fursa mgonjwa wa TB kuchagua mahali na msimamizi wa matibabu yake (PCT), ulianzishwa nchini Tanzania mwaka 2005. Utaratibu huu unampa mgonjwa uwezo wa kuchagua mahali pa kunywa dawa za kutibu TB kila siku chini ya usimamizi: ama kwenye kituo cha tiba chini ya uangalizi wa mtaalamu wa afya au nyumbani kwa kusimamiwa na ndugu au mwana jamii aliyemteua mwenyewe. Filamu hii inawaelekeza wahudumu wa afya, wasimamizi na wagonjwa wenyewe jinsi ya kutumia utaratibu huu ikiwemo wajibu na majukumu ya kila mmoja wao.

title: Louisa's story - community health worker connected
description:
Following the birth of her daughter Regina, Debora started bleeding. The Community Health Officer, Louisa, was on call at the local clinic and was able to manage the case with the support of a mobile phone and the telemedicine project in Ghana, which connected her to a doctor at the district hospital for advice.

The Novartis Foundation collaborates with the Earth Institute, Millennium Villages Project, Ministry of Health, Ministry of Communications and Ghana Health Service on a groundbreaking telemedicine program in Ghana. The program has extended mobile networks and equipped community health workers with new tools and training that have brought skilled medical care directly to communities in underserved villages.

http://www.novartisfoundation.org

title: Om att gå till jobbet (ur Fyra filmer om MS och livet) - www.msliv.se
description:
När jag fick veta att det var MS var min första tanke - hur länge ska jag vara sjukskriven?

"- Det jag behöver är flexibilitet, som att veta att om jag mår dåligt en dag så kan det funka i alla fall".

Det kan kännas svårt att få reda på att man har multipel skleros (MS). Många reagerar med ilska, chock, depression eller oro. Många känner också behov av att skaffa sig kontroll. Det finns mycket resurser och stöd och många effektiva behandlingsalternativ som kan hjälpa dig. 

Läs mer på http://www.msliv.se/

title: New Report on Strategic Philanthropy
description:
A new report from Credit Suisse and Rockefeller Philanthropy Advisors, entitled, "Strategic Philanthropy: Guide to Evaluation," provides greater context and clarity around evaluation, drawing from a review of best practices, interviews conducted by Rockefeller Philanthropy Advisors and examples from a variety of case studies, to address why philanthropists think about evaluation. The paper also gives an overview of the major trends and practices in evaluation, and provides suggestions on how philanthropists can make evaluation effective for their work.

More information: https://www.credit-suisse.com/upload/news-live/000000022546.pdf

title: Digital Transformation at Nestlé (DAT)
description:
Can digital inspire a large company to think and act like a start-up? Watch Nestlé's fourth Digital Acceleration Team (DAT) put that question to the test.

The DAT is an intensive, highly-entrepreneurial, hands-on 8-month training programme that rotates high-potential brand building talent into our Global Headquarters in Switzerland. The DAT is grounded in three pillars of digital excellence - Listening, Engaging, Inspiring & Transforming. Upon completion of the programme, DAT alumni return to their home market to lead digitally-powered brand building and eCommerce transformation.

Here, the fourth DAT (#DAT4) tells you about their achievements and experiences working at Nestlé HQ. Tune in to see how they #raisethebar.

title: COPD: Highly Illogical—A Special Tribute to Leonard Nimoy
description:
Though the actor Leonard Nimoy was well known for his legendary role as Mr. Spock, few people knew that he was diagnosed with COPD 30 years after he quit smoking. Since his death, Leonard’s family has developed a documentary to raise awareness of the impact of COPD; Novartis is proud to support this special initiative to educate viewers about COPD through Leonard’s and others’ personal stories.

Learn more about Novartis Pharmaceuticals https://www.novartispharmaceuticals.com
© 2015 Novartis AG

title: Working with Multiple Sclerosis – A Novartis Intern’s Experience
description:
Our commitment to patients doesn’t start and stop in the lab, it carries over into the workplace. As a sponsor of the European Multiple Sclerosis Platform’s Believe and Achieve program, we provide employment opportunities for young people living with multiple sclerosis. Each placement offers participants a chance to work as a paid trainee at Novartis, in a supportive, flexible work environment with access to mentorship. Watch as one of our recent Believe and Achieve interns, Nicu Sorin, shares his experience working in the Novartis Pharmaceuticals Portugal office.

This video was originally displayed at the 17th Annual Congress of the European Hematological Association (EHA) in Amsterdam June 14 - 17, 2012.

This video was produced in collaboration with the EHA.

title: Nestlé spreads its wings to support UK butterflies - 75 acres of butterfly meadows to be created
description:
The homes of KIT KAT, NESCAFE, BUXTON and ROWNTREE'S are sowing the seeds to help halt the decline of the UK's butterfly population as part of a new national programme.  Nestlé UK & Ireland will co-ordinate the planting of nearly 75 acres of butterfly meadows -- the equivalent of almost 250 football pitches - with the aim of attracting more than 10 varieties of butterflies to the sites.

By 2015 all thirteen UK sites will have a wildflower meadow within the factory grounds.  In addition, seven dairy farmers, part of the Nestlé First Milk Sustainability Partnership have joined the programme to boost the total to 75 acres.  The farmers are from the group who supply the Girvan factory in Scotland with around 70 million litres of milk each year to be used in Nestlé's milk chocolate and will plant wildflower meadows on their land.  Nestlé will look to further expand the programme across the entire supply chain.

title: Анкерная заклёпка TU- S (анкер типа Kайл (Keil)
description:
http://sfs-intec.ru/  Саморезы компании SFS intec на сайте официального дистрибьютора в Российской Федерации, Беларуси и Казахстане.
0:16 Монтаж анкерной заклёпки TU-S (анкер типа Кайл (Keil).
Анкерная заклёпка TU-S (анкер типа Кайл (Keil).
Компаний SFS intec разработана анкерная заклепка TU-S для скрытого крепления фасадных панелей HPL, ROCK-панелей и керамогранита. 
Система TU-S используется для крепления кронштейнов на задней 
стороне HPL-панели, ROCK-панели и керамогранита толщиной 8-13 мм. Скрытое крепление TU-S от компании SFS intec простотой и удобно в монтаже, на установке экономится до 30% времени (по сравнению с традиционными система скрытого монтажа). Для монтажа не требуется специальный инструмент. Скрытое крепление TU-S при необходимости демонтируется без специального инструмента. При установке крепёж невозможно перекрутить. За счёт расширения в материале и специальной резьбе крепёж имеет высокие показатели на вырыв. Самопроизвольное выкручивание крепежа невозможно. Эстетика фасада. Окраска в любые цвета RAL. 
Инновационное скрытое крепление для облицовка фасада и отделка фасадов. TU-S – это также скрытое крепление керамогранита на фасад, для вентилируемый керамогранит. Применяется в качестве: скрытые крепления панелей, скрытая система крепления, скрытое крепление стеновых панелей, саморезы для скрытого крепления. Заклепки SFS – гарантия европейского качества. На нашем сайте SFS intec, СФС – www.sfs-intec.ru – Вы найдете SFS intec каталог саморезы, SFS каталог. 
Анкерная заклёпка TU-S (анкер типа Кайл (Keil).

title: Roche Scientific Campus - Strengthening diagnostics capacity in Africa
description:
The healthcare sector in Africa faces a lot of challenges, one of the largest is the shortage of accredited diagnostic laboratories and trained technicians. The Roche Scientific campus in Johannesburg, South Africa, is a purpose-built training center designed to strengthen laboratory medicine training and knowledge on the African continent.
It provides not only hands-on, certified training courses for laboratory technologists and engineers but also general laboratory management training for managers and policy makers as well as medical and scientific training and education on specific health and scientific topics for healthcare workers.

title: Spark® 20M - Tomorrow´s imaging multimode plate reader
description:
Tecan has launched the Spark® 20M multimode microplate reader, offering tailor-made solutions to suit virtually any drug discovery or advanced life science research application. This freely configurable system gives researchers access to new techniques and features intended to enhance and streamline biochemical and cell-based workflows. At the heart of the instrument are Spark’s unique Fusion Optics and a powerful xenon flash lamp, which can be combined with your choice of high performance detection modules to ensure a perfect match for your workflow. Options include an enhanced fluorescence module designed to improve sensitivity and increase the speed of high throughput screening, and the newly developed Te-Cool™ cooling module that uniquely allows the measurement chamber temperature to be set below the ambient room temperature for more accurate and reliable results.
The Spark 20M’s cell handling capabilities have also been extended, with a new automated cell imaging and confluence measurement feature. This allows incubation and monitoring of cell culture microplates within the measurement chamber, enabling the user to define the confluence at which the assay starts/ends or the substrate is injected, for optimal assay results and greater walkaway operation. These new options – combined with the ability to read 6- to 1,536-well microplates – ensure there is a Spark 20M configuration to increase the productivity of your lab, both today and in the future.

Spark® multimode reader is a research use only

title: Der Nutzen von in-vitro-Diagnostika
description:
Roche ist das weltweit führende Unternehmen im Bereich der in-vitro-Diagnostika. Wir sind der Überzeugung, dass eine rechtzeitige, rasche und präzise Diagnose Grundlage jeder guten Behandlung ist. Wir haben uns zum Ziel gesetzt, unsere Diagnostik-Produkte immer schneller und zuverlässiger zu machen, zum Vorteil von Ärzten, Laboren und Patienten. Und wir forschen stetig, um neue Testverfahren für Krankheiten zu entwickeln, die bis anhin nicht oder nur unzureichend diagnostiziert werden können, so dass Ärzte noch bessere Therapieentscheidungen treffen können. Für das Wohl von Patienten auf der ganzen Welt, und zur effizienten Verwendung von Gesundheitsbudgets. Mehr über Roche Diagnostics: www.roche.com/diagnostics

title: Panalpina: Behind the scenes of our relief flight with UNICEF for Burundi
description:
In this mission, Panalpina helps UNICEF to fly much-needed relief goods from Europe to Burundi to replenish the nationwide medication supply chain, which was on the verge of complete stock out. The 70 tons of primary medical care goods such as antibiotics, analgesics, infusion sets and hospital equipment, were distributed to health centers, where sick children under five and pregnant women can access free healthcare and medication. Once at the health districts, these vital goods were distributed to the over 960 health centers and hospitals across the country’s 18 provinces. 

You can find additional information related to Panalpina’s relief flight to Burundi on the following UNICEF pages:
https://www.facebook.com/unicef.ch
https://www.facebook.com/UNICEFBurundi/?fref=ts
www.unicef.ch

For more about our previous relief flights for UNICEF:

title: Terence Moodley, Head of the Roche Scientific Campus, Südafrika
description:
Terence, ein Süd-Afrikaner Indischer Herkunft, kam als sehr erfahrener Spital-Arzt zu Roche. Heute leitet er den Roche Scientific Campus, ein Kompetenzzentrum zur Weiterbildung von Laborpersonal auf dem afrikanischen Kontinent. Der Campus bietet ein breites Spektrum an Ausbildungen, zum Teil in Zusammenarbeit mit globalen Partnern. Ziel der Ausbildungen ist die Verbesserung der Qualität der angebotenen Labordienstleistungen und damit die bessere Betreuung von Patienten. In Regionen mit eingeschränkter medizinischer Versorgung wie in Teilen Afrikas, ist es eine grosse Herausforderung, dem Laborpersonal den korrekten Umgang mit unseren hoch-innovativen diagnostischen Geräten zu vermitteln. „Ich liebe meine Arbeit - es ist fantastisch, zu etwas Grossem beizutragen und Gesellschaft sowie das Gesundheitswesen eines Landes positiv zu beeinflussen."

Warum wir jeden Tag zur Arbeit kommen: http://www.roche.com/de/about_roche/our_purpose.htm

title: Shiva Malek, Senior Scientist bei Genentech
description:
Im Iran geboren, wanderte Shiva im Alter von sieben Jahren in die USA ein. Heute leitet Shiva eine Forschungsgruppe, die Genentech's  Onkologieprogramme mit kleinen Molekülen mit In-vitro-Pharmakologie unterstützt. Ausserdem betreut sie das gesamte Hochdurchsatz-Screening -- eine Aufgabe grosser Verantwortung und Tragweite. Wissenschaft hat sie seit jeher fasziniert, weshalb sie jeden Tag mit Elan zur Arbeit kommt. "Ich will ein Umfeld schaffen, in dem sich Mitarbeitende als Teil eines Team und dennoch verantwortlich für ihre Projekte fühlen. Dies ist die bestmögliche Motivation."

title: Roche - Doing now what patients need next (deutsch)
description:
"Wir sind uns bewusst, wie wichtig es ist, medizinische Lösungen heute zur Verfügung zu stellen und gleichzeitig Innovationen für morgen zu entwickeln. Wir arbeiten mit Leidenschaft daran, die Gesundheit und das Leben von Patienten zu verbessern. Wir zeigen Mut in unseren Entscheidungen und in unserem Tun. Und wir sind davon überzeugt, dass gutes und erfolgreiches Handeln zu einer besseren Welt beiträgt.
Das ist der Grund, warum wir täglich zur Arbeit kommen. Wir fühlen uns der Wissenschaft verpflichtet, setzen höchste ethische Maßstäbe und bekennen uns zum Zugang zu medizinischen Innovationen für alle. Wir tun dies, um an einer besseren Zukunft mitzuwirken.
Wir sind stolz darauf, wer wir sind, was wir leisten und wie wir dabei vorgehen. Wir sind viele und arbeiten Hand in Hand -- über Funktionen, Standorte und Länder hinweg.
Wir sind Roche."

Warum wir jeden Tag zur Arbeit kommen: http://www.roche.com/de/about_roche/our_purpose.htm

title: AC Extraction Plate* with EVO and Touch Tools (Video Presentation)
description:
Tecan's AC Extraction Plate*, which is based on proprietary TICE™ (Tecan Immobilized Coating Extraction) technology, is a revolutionary, automation­friendly solution designed to streamline sample preparation for LC-MS analysis of small molecules
. 
The AC Extraction Plate is a 96-position, deep-well microplate, with each well containing an extractive TICE™ (Tecan Immobilized Coating Extraction) coating which acts as an extraction phase for small non-polar molecules, absorbing analytes from aqueous environments with high affinity, while proteins, phospholipids, carbohydrates and salts remain in solution

The AC Extraction Plate offers an open development platform that can be applied to sample preparation for a broad range of small molecules (such as vitamin D, steroids, and other small analytes) from biological fluids (including plasma, serum, whole blood, urine and saliva). Those analytes extracted from the AC Extraction Plate can be directly injected into an appropriate analytical detection system, such as LC/MS-MS. 

The AC Extraction Plate requires fewer and easier steps than with SPE and SLE (supported liquid
extraction) comparable plate based technology. Most importantly, with the AC Extraction Plate there is no need for filtration, centrifugation or evaporation. The AC Extraction Plate can also be used immediately, and does not require conditioning or prewashing.

Unlike many of these techniques, sample preparation with the AC Extraction Plate can also be easily automated, providing a rapid, walkaway solution for the extraction of small molecules from biological fluids for LC-MS analysis.

*For research use only -- not for clinical diagnostic applications

title: Willy Stoessel on holistic cyber risk assessment
description:
Willy Stoessel, Head Cyber, Technology & Construction P&C and Special Lines, Swiss Re Corporate Solutions addressed the topic "Holistic cyber risk assessment frameworks" at the Expert Forum on Cyber Risk at the Swiss Re Centre for Global Dialogue. Find out more here: http://cgd.swissre.com/events/Expert_Forum_Cyber_Risk_2016.html#tab_2

WIlly Stoessel
At this conference we have attracted most European based companies, and we realize that over the years, they have developed a lot of understanding of the threats that are coming out of the internet; about the phishing attacks, the way people can get attacked by wrong, fake emails being sent to your employees. We see an improving know-how level of this risk management community, on the client side as much as on the broker side.

One of the key drivers these days, is that the business interruption for our clients in Europe following a cyber attack. This is where the most of the concern is these days. This is also a topic that is especially relevant for the people fabricating products like automotive industry where it's really very sensible. Also with this new regulation coming in to place, we see a much more interest also coming to the liability, to the third party protection side, which will be a driver for the take-up of cyber insurance in the coming years.

The newly enacted ER regulation that will take place in 2018, it will be a key driver for the uptake of the insurance coverage. It involves large fines; 4 percent or a minimum 20 million Euros, but also like notification requirements to the public and the government that will trigger the increase in notification and also like the optic in cyber insurance.

title: AC Extraction Plate (Video Presentation)
description:
Tecan's newly launched AC Extraction Plate is a revolutionary, automation­friendly solution designed to streamline sample preparation for LC-MS analysis of small molecules. The plate, which is based on proprietary TICE™ (Tecan Immobilized Coating Extraction) technology, reduces the sample preparation process to a convenient 'pipette and shake' routine. 

The AC Extraction Plate is a 96-position, deep-well microplate, with the inner surface of each well coated with a highly controlled layer of TICE material. This coating efficiently extracts low molecular weight analytes -- such as vitamin D and testosterone -- from aqueous solutions, eliminating the need for the laborious and time-consuming filtration, centrifugation and evaporation steps that are often integral to other methods. Unlike many of these techniques, sample preparation with the AC Extraction Plate can also be easily automated, providing a rapid, walkaway solution for the extraction of small molecules from biological fluids for LC-MS analysis.

title: Webinar: Drug-drug combinations made simple
description:
The Netherlands Cancer Institute Robotics and Screening Center (NRSC) has implemented a workflow to screen combinations of small molecule drug candidates that either restore or enhance a clinical response based on functional genomic data with high throughput platforms.

This work is set up using the HP D300 Digital Dispenser and have found that it saves time, along with offering flexible, accurate and user friendly setup. The NRSC will also describe a Synergy Tool which they are using for the data analysis.

Join Dr Roderick Beijersbergen and Dr Pasi Halonen from the NRSC to hear further details about this drug synergy workflow including some details for the analysis of the generated data along with Jessica Merlino from Tecan

title: Arun Sundararajan on how work will be transformed
description:
Arun Sundararajan, professor from New York University's Leonard N. Stern School of Business presented the topic "The future of work in the sharing economy" at the 11th CRO Assembly: Technological and societal change, at the Swiss Re Centre for Global Dialogue. Find out more here: http://cgd.swissre.com/events/11th_CRO_Assembly_Technological_and_societal_change.html

He tells Jennifer Davies, from Swiss Re CGD, that he is optimistic that the sharing economy can work in the long run. 

JD: Does the sharing economy really mean more work for more people, or does it erode traditionally secure industries leaving only low-paid part-time work?

Arun Sundararajan: I think that there are two very common narratives associated with the sharing economy. One is the empowered entrepreneurs who take control of their destinies. The other is the disenfranchised drones, a race to the bottom where everybody is chasing piece work. I think to some extent both of these narratives are going to play out. Fundamentally, the sharing economy is economic growth inducing – it increases the size of the pie. 

I'm optimistic about the fact that the sharing economy is going to be equalizing, simply because, if I look at how the transition is occurring, it is resulting in a structure where a larger fraction of the population owns the means of production. Actually owning the assets, or the 'know-how' associated with providing short-term accommodation, providing transportation, providing healthcare services, providing other kinds of labour services. 

So spreading the wealth across a larger fraction of the population, spreading the means of production and decentralizing it to people who used to simply be labour suppliers, I think, in the long run will lead to an increase equality and be democratizing in some ways access to a higher standard of living.  

JD: How can we provide social safety nets for those workers in the sharing economy? 

Arun Sundararajan: New models for creating a social safety net are one of the biggest challenges that governments will face over the coming decades. What we have to fundamentally do is rethink the funding for these safety nets. It's really important we preserve them because these are the signs of progress that we tend to be proud of. Yes, we like the fact that the economy grows, but we also like the fact that people work a certain number of hours a day that there are paid vacations, that there are workplace protections, that there are minimum wages, that there's overtime. All of these things are signs of progress of a society. 

I think in many European countries, especially in the Scandinavian countries, we already have a fairly robust government-provided safety net. In the United States or the United Kingdom, on the other hand, the safety net is very heavily contingent on being a full-time employee. Those other countries where the rethinking has to happen far more rapidly and with a lot more creativity because it's unlikely that a government-provided safety net is going to appear anytime.

JD: Arun Sundararajan, thank you very much. 

Arun Sundararajan: Thank you.

title: Drawn to Science: HBV virus - the little big enemy
description:
Viruses are self-replicating nano-machines that stride the border between living and non-living. The hepatitis B virus in its chronic form can nest in the liver for years, sometimes as a tiny fragment of cyclic DNA. It is estimated that about 360 million people worldwide have chronic HBV infection, 75 percent being in Asia. Roche pRED (Pharma Research & Early Development) has active research programs targeting the hepatitis B virus.  For more information visit http://www.roche.com/research_and_development.htm

More videos on http://www.youtube.com/user/roche

Du baust Hochleistungsaufzüge, Maschinen und führst die damit verbundenen Montage- und Inbetriebsetzungsarbeiten aus. Du pflegst eine enge Zusammenarbeit mit Polymechanikern und Konstrukteuren.

title: Roche-Praktika für Medizinstudierende: Einblick in die Pharmaindustrie
description:
Sie befinden sich noch im Studium, brennen aber darauf, endlich einmal ihr Wissen praktisch umzusetzen? Sie wollen als angehender Mediziner Alternativen zur klinischen Karriere kennenlernen? Sie wollen in die Pharmaindustrie hineinschnuppern? Dann starten Sie jetzt ein Praktikum bei Roche in Grenzach: Bei uns können Sie zeigen, was in Ihnen steckt - fachlich wie persönlich. title: Infinite® M1000 PRO multi mode plate reader with Premium Quad4 Monochromators™ technology
description:
Tecan's Quad4 Monochromators technology uses two excitation monochromators and two emission monochromators. The premium Quad4 Monochromators system of the Infinite M1000 PRO plate reader further optimizes this technology, using a flash lamp with double the power and switchable flash frequency settings (for fluorescence intensity) to provide even more light to both the sample and the detector, as well as offering improved spectral blocking and extended stray light reduction down to 2x10-7.
The new Infinite M1000 PRO, Tecan's latest modular multimode microplate reader with AlphaScreen®/AlphaLISA® technology, is equipped with premium Quad4 Monochromators and also features adjustable bandwidth settings to ultra-fine tune the amount of excitation and emission light to optimize the sensitivity for fluorescence based measurements. You can run advanced assay types like FRET, TR-FRET, fluorescence polarization and glow/flash luminescence and eliminate the need for absorbance and fluorescence filters.

title: Ochrana žen před rakovinou děložního čípku
description:
Vysoce rizikové typy HPV jsou příčinou téměř všech případů rakoviny děložního čípku. Infekce HPV je docela běžná a ve většině případů je tělo samo schopno virus odstranit. U některých žen však infekce přetrvává, což může vést k rakovině děložního čípku. Z více než 40 potenciálně rakovinotvorných typů HPV, je 14 považováno za vysoce rizikové. Ale pouze dva typy HPV - 16 a 18 - jsou zodpovědné za přibližně 70 % karcinomů děložního čípku. Speciální test poskytuje individuální výsledky testů pro HPV 16 a 18, spolu se sdruženým výsledkem pro ostatních 12 vysoce rizikových genotypů, a tím umožňuje okamžitou identifikaci těchto žen, které jsou nejvíce ohroženy a potřebují okamžitý zásah. 

Další videa naleznete na http://www.youtube.com/user/roche

title: V-ZUG Brand Movie Russian (long)
description:
Фирма V-ZUG AG является лидером швейцарского рынка в области бытовой техники. Она занимается разработкой, производством и сбытом высококачественной бытовой техники для кухни и стирки. Уже одно это лидирующее положение обязывает V-ZUG к тому, чтобы предпринимать серьезные усилия и не терять свои позиции. Больше 3 миллионов единиц бытовой техники фирмы эксплуатируются в Швейцарии, то есть в каждом втором швейцарском домашнем хозяйстве техника от V-ZUG помогает варить, жарить, печь, мыть посуду, стирать и сушить белье.

Основанная в 1913 году фирма V-ZUG AG не только сохраняет свои позиции, но и укрепляет их. Прежде всего потому что произведенная на фирме бытовая техника для кухни и стирки отражает философию, которая направлена прежде всего на удовлетворение пожеланий швейцарских потребителей. Это в первую очередь экономность в работе, долгосрочность эксплуатации и щадящее обращение с ресурсами.

title: V-ZUG Brand Movie English (long)
description:
V-ZUG is the Swiss market leader for household appliances. It develops, produces and sells high quality appliances for the kitchen and laundry room. Its market position alone obliges V-ZUG to make huge efforts. More than 3,5 million appliances are in use in Switzerland, which means that, statistically speaking, a V-ZUG appliance is helping people to cook, bake, wash up, wash and dry in every other Swiss household.

Established in 1913, V-ZUG Ltd has succeeded in not only maintaining but also expanding its important position. This is thanks primarily to the fact that the laundry room and kitchen appliances from V-ZUG reflect a philosophy that is tailored specifically to the demands of the Swiss customer. Above all else, this includes low consumption levels, longevity and the sparing use of resources.

title: V-ZUG Brand Movie Russian (short)
description:
Фирма V-ZUG AG является лидером швейцарского рынка в области бытовой техники. Она занимается разработкой, производством и сбытом высококачественной бытовой техники для кухни и стирки. Уже одно это лидирующее положение обязывает V-ZUG к тому, чтобы предпринимать серьезные усилия и не терять свои позиции. Больше 3 миллионов единиц бытовой техники фирмы эксплуатируются в Швейцарии, то есть в каждом втором швейцарском домашнем хозяйстве техника от V-ZUG помогает варить, жарить, печь, мыть посуду, стирать и сушить белье.

Основанная в 1913 году фирма V-ZUG AG не только сохраняет свои позиции, но и укрепляет их. Прежде всего потому что произведенная на фирме бытовая техника для кухни и стирки отражает философию, которая направлена прежде всего на удовлетворение пожеланий швейцарских потребителей. Это в первую очередь экономность в работе, долгосрочность эксплуатации и щадящее обращение с ресурсами.

title: Innovation et qualité suisses depuis 100 ans
description:
Depuis 1913, V-ZUG est synonyme de Premium Swiss Quality. La qualité haut de gamme est non seulement une tradition maison, mais elle nous motive également à progresser: nos inventions et nos innovations posent régulièrement de nouveaux standards à l'échelle internationale. Nos clientes et nos clients sont au coeur de notre recherche, afin de leur proposer des appareils qui constituent des sources d'inspiration et sont synonymes du plus grand confort.

L'entreprise V-ZUG SA est aujourd'hui la seule marque complètement suisse d'appareils électro-ménagers et le seul fabricant à développer et produire des appareils haut de gamme, à la fois pour la cuisine et pour la buanderie à Zoug, au coeur de la Suisse. L'altissima qualità non è solo una nostra tradizione, ma soprattutto un impegno a progredire: le nostre scoperte e innovazioni pongono sempre nuovi standard di riferimento nel mondo. E al centro poniamo sempre voi, le nostre e i nostri clienti, con prodotti da cui potrete trarre ispirazione nella vostra cucina, offrendovi il massimo comfort.

title: FE500pro™, The Effective Pre-Analytical Automation Solution from Tecan
description: The FE500pro is Tecan's front-end, pre-analytical laboratory automation solution. Automation of the pre-analytical process is receiving increasing interest from laboratory managers all over the world. FE500pro combines pre-analytical functions including pre-sorting, centrifugation, volume check and clot detection, decapping, secondary tube labeling, aliquoting and destination sorting into analyzer racks, on a small footprint instrument.

title: LIFESTYLE by V-ZUG: Welcome by Tanja Grandits
Cavro® Omni Robot
description: The Cavro Omni Robot was designed for OEM laboratory instruments with reliability, ease of integration and flexibility in mind. This simple, strong and innovative design meets the accuracy and precision demanded by the tight dimensions of higher density 384 and even 1,536-well plates. This is the ideal robotic component for customers who need to automate liquid handling steps, whether it is integrated inside of an enclosed analyzer or as a table top, stand-alone component. The Cavro Omni Robot defines a new class of robotic components that is modular, easy to integrate into custom applications, and is designed with reliability in mind. For more information on this system, or any of your liquid handling needs, talk to Tecan.

title: Infinite® 200 PRO NanoQuant
description:
The Infinite® 200 PRO NanoQuant was the first microplate reader to be developed specifically for absorbance applications with small sample size. This sensitive plate reader meets highest spectrometer capabilities covering the UV to NIR spectral range and is available with Tecan's Quad4 monochromators™ or with UV-stable filters, and can detect DNA concentrations as low as 1 ng/μl. This affordable plate reader represents a simplified version of the standard Infinite® 200 PRO multimode reader and is compatible with Tecan's patent pending NanoQuant Plate™.


Tecan's NanoQuant Plate - a powerful tool for nucleic acid applications

The Infinite® 200 PRO NanoQuant is the ideal solution for a broad range of applications for measuring DNA- or RNA- quantification, for quality control and labeling efficiency. It delivers excellent sensitivity, multiplexing capability and high format flexibility including 6 -- 384-well microplates as well as half-area plates and the NanoQuant Plate for low concentration and small sample size.

In the unique NanoQuant Plate a special quartz optic for each of the 16 samples guarantees outstanding performance and a high rate of reproducibility. The plate offers quick and easy cleaning to minimize the risk of cross contamination. In addition after a working day the plate can be even cleaned in an ultra sonic water bath for additional efficient cleaning. The NanoQuant Plate is compatible with an eight-channel pipette to easy dispense the samples on the 16 positions of the tool.


Easy to use software features for different applications

The latest i-control™ software includes new application-oriented features which enables more user comfort with the established methods by a minimum of user interventions, e.g. DNA or RNA quantification.

Depending on the application needs, DNA or RNA samples can be measured either with the NanoQuant Plate with low sample volume of 2 µl to conserve most of your precious samples, or e.g. half-area well plates can be used with a volume of 20 µl without wasting any volume of the measured sample. 

The Infinite 200 PRO NanoQuant can be upgraded with all additional detection modes that are available with the standard Infinite 200 PRO as required.

title: 100 YEARS OF V-ZUG: A forerunner celebrates its centenary
description:
V-ZUG has been an Ambassador of Premium Swiss Quality since 1913. Meticulous workmanship and leading technology, producing products with superior quality and striking elegance is a long tradition at V-ZUG. The company is committed to progress and innovation that drives to provide more efficient and user-friendly appliances in the kitchen and laundry room. Innovation by V-ZUG now sets the standard around the globe. Made in Switzerland for 100 years and now available to customers around the Globe.

Swiss manufacturing
V-ZUG has successfully established itself as a premium brand, where the expectations regarding the quality of appliances and timeless design are the highest. Top quality and innovation would not be possible at V-ZUG without tapping in to the heart of the Company. Today, the manufacturing tools used in production are still made within the company, as they have for 100 years. Innovative production technologies combined with superior workmanship lead to the highest levels of precision and quality. Each appliance is checked at every production stage. The company production approach is order and not mass production; V-ZUG manufacturing accepts no compromises on quality.

title: Which silicone fights moisture in my bathroom?
description:
Sika Sanisil® is a one-part acetoxycure silicone sealant that cures by reaction with atmospheric moisture to form a durable elastomer. Sika Sanisil® is suitable for sanitary and other applications where mildew resistance is required. Sika Sanisil® is resistant to moisture. In addition, it has excellent resistance to ageing, shrinkage, cracking and discolouring. It does not contain solvents.

Product benefits:
– Solvent free
– 100% silicone polymer
– fungus and mildew resistant
– excellent elasticity

title: SikaCem® Summer - for longer workability of concrete and mortar
description:
The product is ideal for elevated temperatures and concrete with longer transport times, difficult placing conditions, large volume pours, re-vibrated concrete, etc.

The advantages are a controlled delay of setting and hardening of concrete and cement-based mortar and a longer workability.

title: We're Smarter Together: Swiss Re's 150th Anniversary
description:
Swiss Re http://www.swissre.com/ celebrated its 150th anniversary http://150.swissre.com/ by fostering a global dialogue https://openminds.swissre.com/ in many places around the world. Experts, visionaries, families, people from every walk of life and across generations came together to discuss ideas and solutions for the world's biggest challenges such as food security, sustainable energy solutions, climate change and funding longer lives.

Filmmaker Viviane Blumenschein conducted close to two hundred interviews and collected over five hundred hours worth of footage as she followed the global dialogue from Switzerland to South Africa, from the United Kingdom to the United States and finally to China. This is her film. Follow the global dialogue, led by journalist Bill Emmott, and discover the voices, thoughts and ideas from people across the globe. 

The universal challenges we all face can only be solved by working together, thinking together, and finding the solutions together. Open conversations with the diversity of the world will help us find the answers. We are smarter together.

Swiss Re website ► http://www.swissre.com/
Swiss Re 150 years micro-site ► http://150.swissre.com/ 
Open Minds blog ► https://openminds.swissre.com/

title: sigma 1/2014 Natural catastrophes and man-made disasters 2013
description: According to the latest sigma study, global insured losses from natural catastrophes and man-made disasters were USD 45 billion in 2013, down from USD 81 billion in 2012. title: SikaSwell® - durable joint sealing
description:
SikaSwell®systems are highly effective hydrophilic joint sealing systems for structural joints. They are easily bonded to joints and penetrations in concrete with Sika adhesives, normally with no additional work required to the reinforcement or formwork. 

The SikaSwell® product range includes durable solutions for sealing construction joints, pipe penetrations, precast sections and isolation joints i.e. between concrete and steel components. 

The SikaSwell® systems can also provide effective solutions for waterproofing in difficult exposure or application conditions, like seawater, during periods of heavy rainfall on site, or when rapid installation without extended waiting or curing times is needed.

title: SGKB Jahresabschluss 2014

title: Training Video: Jointing threads of malleable cast iron fittings – GF Piping Systems – Italiano
description:
Until today the Whitworth Pipe Thread or in other words the joint sealing within the thread (according to EN 10226-1) has a high meaning in pipe work. Also piping systems using different joint techniques need the thread joint to connect valves, vessels, etc. Since 150 years Georg Fischer manufactures threaded malleable cast iron fittings. It is a pleasure for us to share our experience in the field of making thread joints. This video shows how to apply hemp and sealing paste properly on an external thread of a steel pipe and to connect it with our malleable cast iron fitting. With this video and some trials jour thread joints will as well keep performing 150 years.

title: Conversations | Public/Private | Museums Go Global
description:
Expanding the collecting and exhibiting mandates of many leading Western museums is accompanied by a host of unanswered questions: What aspects of global art culture should these institutions embrace? How should museums modify their approaches to collecting, programming, and educating? What institutional models should they adopt? And how are artists and institutions in other parts of the world responding to the intensified regional presence of Western institutions? Drawing on recent experiences with global initiatives and collaborations, this panel of leading curators and museum directors will explore the benefits and pitfalls of going global.
 
Patrick Charpenel, Director, Fundación Jumex, Mexico City; Chris Dercon, Director, Tate Modern, London; Chus Martinez, Chief Curator at El Museo del Barrio, New York; Alexandra Munroe, Samsung Senior Curator, Asian Art, Solomon R. Guggenheim Museum, New YorkModerator: András Szántó, Author and Consultant to arts and philanthropic organizations, New York

Filmed on site at Art Basel in Miami Beach, Friday, December 6, 2013

title: Trainingsvideo: Herstellen einer Gewindeverbindung mit Tempergussfittings – GF Piping Systems
description:
Bis heute hat das Whitworth-Rohrgewinde und damit die im Gewinde dichtende Verbindung (nach EN 10226-1) für den Rohrleitungsbau eine hohe Bedeutung. Auch Rohrleitungssysteme die auf alternative Verbindungstechniken setzen, benötigen die Gewindeverbindung z.B. bei Anschlüssen  von Armaturen, Behältern, etc.  Seit über 150 Jahren stellt Georg Fischer Gewindefittings aus Temperguss her. Unsere Erfahrung auf dem Gebiet der Gewindeverbindung geben wir gerne weiter. Wie man ein Außengewinde auf einem Stahlrohr korrekt mit Hanf und Dichtpaste aufdichtet und mit unserem Tempergussfitting verbindet, ist hier zu sehen. Mit diesem Video und etwas Übung halten Ihre Gewindeverbindungen ebenfalls 150 Jahre.

Bitte beachten Sie ebenfalls die Verarbeitungshinweise in unserem Technischen Katalog, den wir gerne elektronisch oder als Printversion zur Verfügung stellen. Besuchen Sie hierzu www.fittings.at

title: Vorschau: Swissbau Focus Arena - Bildung für die Bau- und Immobilienwirtschaft
description:
LIVE am Dienstag, 17. Januar 2012 um 16 Uhr in der Swissbau Focus Arena (Halle 1.2), an der Swissbau in Basel!

Die Bau- und Immobilienwirtschaft beklagt sich immer akzentuierter über einen akuten Mangel an qualifiziertem Nachwuchs. Der Personalnotstand ist so gross, dass heute viele Leute aus dem Ausland geholt werden müssen. 

In der Swissbau Focus Arena vom Dienstag, 17. Januar 2012, werden mögliche Antworten auf den Personalnotstand der Branche diskutiert. Welche Kompetenzen braucht unsere Bau- und Immobilienwirtschaft? Wohin führt die laufende Reform des Schweizer Bildungssystems? Welche Rollen sollen Universitäten und Fachhochschulen dabei spielen? Welche Karte fällt den Unternehmen und Fachverbänden zu?

Moderiert wird die Arena von Filippo Leutenegger. Die Diskussionsteilnehmer im inneren Kreis sind:
Daniel Büchel, Vizepräsident Bundesamt für Energie, Programmleiter EnergieSchweiz
Stefan Cadosch, Präsident SIA, Partner Architekturbüro cadosch & zimmermann
Ursula Renold, Direktorin Bundesamt für Berufsbildung und Technologie
Peter Schillinger, Zentralpräsident Suissetec, Geschäftsleiter Herzog Haustechnik AG

Zur Veranstaltungsteilnahme treffen Sie bitte pünktlich um 15.30 Uhr bei der Arena im Swissbau Focus (Halle 1.2) ein. Die Veranstaltung beginnt um 16.00 Uhr und wird live im Regionalfernsehen übertragen.

title: Kitchen Smarts: Middle School Mess | NESTLE CREAM | Nestle PH
description:
Check out Chef Sharwin's version of a Middle School Mess! It's fruity, creamy, and downright yummy!

Ingredients:
2 large mangoes, seeded and skinned
1 pack NESTLÉ Cream
1 tbsp confectioner's sugar
1 cup meringue biscuits
1/2 cup cashews, chopped
4 tbsp coco jam, diluted in 2 tsp of hot water
Dried mangoes for garnish

Procedure:
1. Mash the flesh of 1 mango with a fork or a potato masher. Mix in NESTLÉ Cream and confectioner's sugar. Chill in the fridge for 30 minutes or until set.
2. Slice the remaining mango into cubes.
3. Crush meringue biscuits.
4. To assemble, put the cubed mangoes at the bottom, top with the mango cream, layer with chopped cashews and meringue biscuits, and finish with a drizzle of coco jam.

title: Kitchen Smarts: Creamy Longganisa and Squash Pasta | NESTLE CREAM | Nestle PH
description:
This weekend, treat the family to a hearty plate of Chef Sharwin's Creamy Longganisa and Squash Pasta!

Ingredients:
4 links of Vigan longganisa, skinned
1 1/2 cup squash, cubed
1 tsp sage leaves
2 tbsp onions, minced
1 cup elbow macaroni
1 pack NESTLÉ Cream
1 tsp chili flakes
Water
Chopped parsley
Salt and pepper

Procedure:
1. Sauté Vigan longganisa over low to medium heat. Add in the onions. Break up the longganisa and sauté for two minutes or until fragrant. 
2.Add in the squash, sage, and water. Let it simmer until the squash is fully cooked. 
3. Boil water in a pot and cook the macaroni until al denté.
4. Add NESTLÉ Cream to the sauce and mix. Add the chili flakes, salt, and pepper.
5. Mix and combine with the cooked macaroni. Garnish with chopped parsley.

Check out our Facebook page at www.facebook.com/nestlecream.ph

title: Kitchen Smarts: Indian Butter Chicken | NESTLE CREAM | Nestle PH
description:
Take your taste buds on an adventure with Chef Sharwin's Indian Butter Chicken!

Ingredients:
4 pcs boneless chicken thighs or breasts, cubed
2 cloves of garlic, minced
1 tbsp ginger, minced
1 tbsp cilantro stems, chopped
6 basil leaves, chopped
1 tbsp curry powder
1 cup tomato sauce
2 tbsp banana catsup
1 pack NESTLÉ Cream
2 tbsp butter
1 tbsp hot sauce
Water
1/4 cup unsalted peanuts, chopped
Cilantro leaves
Salt and pepper

Procedure:
1. Marinate the chicken by mixing in garlic, ginger, cilantro stems, curry powder, salt, and pepper.
2. In a pan, mix butter and the marinated chicken together. Once fragrant, add in tomato sauce, banana catsup, hot sauce, water, and basil. Simmer for 7 minutes or until chicken is cooked.
3. Pour in NESTLÉ Cream, turn off the heat, and mix.
4. Garnish with chopped peanuts and cilantro leaves.

title: 5-Series Diaphragm Valve - Servicing the diaphragm - GF Piping Systems - English
description:
The new Generation Diaphragm Valve of GF Piping System sets new standards regarding safety, efficiency and simplicity.

Instead of the commonly used four metal screws the Diaphragm Valve of GF Piping Systems has a central union nut - this non-corrosive connection is characterised by homogeneous temperature behaviour, an even surface pressure and high pressure rating up to 16 bar.

The optimal flow geometry offers double flow with same energy expenditure. With almost linear flow characteristics this guarantees stable processes.

Beyond that the weir of the branched Diaphragm valve of GF Piping Systems has been moved directly to the pipe wall of the main line. Therefore dead leg was reduced to an absolute minimum and thus the hygiene was increased at the same time.

Standard equipment like a lockable handwheel, a two-coloured indicator and an interface for a self-adjusting limit switch set new standards in terms of user-friendliness.

For more information visit our website: 
http://www.gfps.com/appgate/ecat/common_flow/100005/COM/en/index.html

title: ViBmas un Sistema de gestión que promueve la salud en el entorno laboral
description:
Un Entorno Laboral Saludable -según la definición de la  Organización Mundial de la Salud- es aquel en que los trabajadores y directivos colaboran en un proceso de mejora continua para promover y proteger la salud, la seguridad y bienestar de los trabajadores y la sustentabilidad del ambiente de trabajo.

SGS ha desarrollado el programa viBmas; un  sistema de gestión que promueve la salud en el entorno laboral de un modo proactivo, con el objetivo de mejorar la organización y las condiciones de trabajo, promover la participación activa y fomentar el desarrollo individual.

viBmas consiste en un conjunto MULTIDISCIPLINAR de acciones cuyo objetivo es procurar el ÓPTIMO estado de salud FÍSICO, MENTAL y SOCIAL de la POBLACIÓN LABORAL.

description:
100 employees visit 100 customers:

Roman Bader, Adventure Sports Specialist
visited by Eliana Wüest, Special Tasks Digital Experience department, Swiss Life Switzerland

The customer:
Roman Bader, 33, lives in Kloten near Zurich with his wife and two-year-old daughter. He is Managing Director of Exclusive Adventure AG. His company offers private individuals and companies a variety of outdoor sports such as skydiving or canyoning, enabling him to turn his hobby into a career. The former Special Forces soldier likes to spend his free time quietly at home with his family. Roman Bader is a Swiss Life corporate and private client

The employee:
Eliana Wüst, 42, works in Marketing at Swiss Life for Special tasks in the Digital Experience department. She moved out of tourism over 15 years ago into an online start-up. Since then she has been exclusively involved with online marketing and digital projects.  Eliana Wüst likes to spend her free time in the outdoors, climbing mountains, participating in various outdoor sports or horse-riding.

The project:
Customers play the leading role in the “100 employees visit 100 customers” campaign. Until the end of 2015, Swiss Life is giving 100 employees, who have no customer contact in their day-to-day work, the opportunity to get to know a customer.

title: 100/100: Karl Albert «Charlie Kunz», Brass instrument maker
description:
100 employees visit 100 customers

Karl Albert «Charlie Kunz», Brass instrument maker
visited by Bernhard Maier, Head of Logistics & Strategic Purchasing, Swiss Life Germany

The customer:
Brass instrument maker Karl-Albert Kunz, 54, has been called «Charlie» by everyone since he was young. He is married, has three sons and lives in Saarbrücken. For 30 years the brass instrument maker has run his own workshop called «Freebell» on Futterstrasse in Saarbrücken that has made a name for itself for making and servicing brass instruments. In his spare time, Kunz works voluntarily for the fire service in Saarbrücken and has played the trumpet since he was a child. Karl-Albert Kunz has a life insurance policy with Swiss Life.

The employee:
Bernhard Maier, 47, is responsible for Logistics and Strategic Purchasing as Swiss Life in Munich. He has worked at the insurance company for five years in a position in which he has a lot of dealings with external partners. Having originally trained as a carpenter and worked in sales for over 15 years, Bernhard Maier says the following about his business partners: «I know who's sitting opposite me.» He lives to the south of Munich and has two sons. He most enjoys spending his free time with his family at his cottage in Austria. Bernhard Maier is also very active in sports: He goes canoeing, travels round the world, takes part in ski tours and enjoys motorcycling. 

The project:
Customers play the leading role in the “100 employees visit 100 customers” campaign. Until the end of 2015, Swiss Life is giving 100 employees, who have no customer contact in their day-to-day work, the opportunity to get to know a customer.

title: 100/100: Eléna Pojarov, musician
description:
100 employees visit 100 customers:

Eléna Pojarov, musician
visited by Horst Stirner, IT systems engineer, Swiss Life Germany

The customer:
Eléna Pojarov from Cologne loves music. She recently released her debut album «Drama 2.0», which sold well online. Security is important to her, that's why she studied business law before devoting herself fully to music. Swiss Life Select also offers her security through a Riester pension annuity, private liability and legal expenses insurance.

The employee:
Horst Stirner, 46, lives in Hanover with his family. He is a hobby musician - however he doesn't have much spare time these days as he is studying business IT as well as working. He has been working at Swiss Life Germany as an IT systems engineer for 14 years already and he takes every opportunity to see his work from an external perspective.

The project:
Customers play the leading role in the “100 employees visit 100 customers” campaign. Until the end of 2015, Swiss Life is giving 100 employees, who have no customer contact in their day-to-day work, the opportunity to get to know a customer.

title: 100/100: Galina Vracheva, Pianist
description:
100 employees visit 100 customers:

Galina Vracheva, Pianist, composer, classical improvisation artist
visited by Tatjana Seelos, Risk & Asset Liability Manager, Swiss Life Switzerland

The customer:
Galina Vracheva, 59, grew up in Bulgaria. She studied at the Moscow and Munich conservatories. She is known worldwide for her improvisations, which are entirely unrehearsed. There are not many artists prepared to take such a risk. She draws her inspiration from prompts given by the public. She has been a regular guest for about five years on the Swiss radio show SRF 2 Kultur and the Bayerischer Rundfunk (a public broadcaster based in Munich). She lives with her husband and son in Zurich.

The employee:
atiana Seelos, 32, completed an internship at Swiss Life in 2010 and the experience made her want to return to the company. She has been a permanent employee since 2013. Tatiana Seelos was born and raised in Moscow and has lived in Switzerland since 2006. She enjoys ballet and tennis in her free time, is passionate about photography and enjoys travel and culture. She lives with her husband in Rüschlikon by Lake Zurich.  

The project:


Customers play the leading role in the “100 employees visit 100 customers” campaign. Until the end of 2015, Swiss Life is giving 100 employees, who have no customer contact in their day-to-day work, the opportunity to get to know a customer.

title: 100/100: Anne Metry, hotelier
description:
100 employees visit 100 customers:
Anne Metry, hotelier
visited by Claude Locher, Treasury manager, Group Finance

The customer:
Anna Metry, 28, lives in the ski resort of Zermatt. Attending Thun Hotel Management School prepared her to take over management of the family hotel shortly after graduating. She works thoroughly in her private and professional life and does one thing at a time. She opted for pillar 3a private pension provision at Swiss Life while the family business is covered by a BVG management policy.

The employee:
laude Locher, 41, comes from Berne but has settled in Zurich. He gets around a lot – he graduated in economics from St. Gallen after spending time in Berne and Glasgow. In the Finance division of Swiss Life Holding he enjoys working in a team and occasionally going for a drink with them after work. «Hiding your opinion never helps anybody; you need to be direct and capable of accepting criticism,» he says.

The project:
Customers play the leading role in the “100 employees visit 100 customers” campaign. Until the end of 2015, Swiss Life is giving 100 employees, who have no customer contact in their day-to-day work, the opportunity to get to know a customer.

title: 100/100: Galina Vracheva,  Pianistin
description:
100 Mitarbeitende besuchen 100 Kunden:

Galina Vracheva, Pianistin
wurde besucht von: Tatiana Seelos, Risk & Asset Liability Manager, Swiss Life Schweiz

Die Kundin:
Galina Vracheva, 59, ist in Bulgarien aufgewachsen. Ausgebildet wurde sie hauptsächlich an den Konservatorien von Moskau und München. Auf den Bühnen der Welt improvisiert sie ohne vorbereitete Partituren und geht damit ein Risiko ein, das nur wenige Künstler bereit sind, auf sich zu nehmen. Dabei lässt sie sich von Stichworten des Publikums inspirieren. Seit rund fünf Jahren ist sie regelmässig zu Gast beim Schweizer Radio SRF 2 Kultur und im Bayerischen Rundfunk. Sie lebt mit ihrem Mann und Sohn in Zürich.

Die Mitarbeiterin:
Tatiana Seelos, 32, machte im Jahr 2010 ein Praktikum bei Swiss Life und wollte später unbedingt zurück. Seit 2013 hat sie eine Festanstellung. Sie ist in Moskau geboren und aufgewachsen und lebt seit 2006 in der Schweiz. In ihrer Freizeit tanzt sie Ballett und spielt Tennis, fotografiert leidenschaftlich, reist gerne und geniesst viele kulturelle Angebote. Sie lebt mit ihrem Ehemann in Rüschlikon am Zürichsee.

Das Projekt:
Bei der Aktion «100 Mitarbeitende besuchen 100 Kunden» spielen die Kunden die Hauptrolle. Swiss Life ermöglicht bis Ende 2015 100 Mitarbeitenden, die in ihrer täglichen Arbeit keinen Kundenkontakt haben, einen Kunden kennenzulernen.

description:

هل تواجهين بعض الصعوبات لإرتداء الثوب المفضل لديك؟ انطلقي لممارسة برنامج رياضي من 14 يوم مع نستله للياقة البدنية. استبدلي نظامك الغذائي اليومي بوجبتين من حبوب نستله للياقة ووجبة ثالثة متوازنة . لتحصلي بعدها على الجسم المثالي وترتدين ثوبك المفضل في 14 يوم."

title: 100/100: Bernhard Maier (Swiss Life Deutschland) besucht Karl-Albert Kunz
description:
100 Mitarbeitende besuchen 100 Kunden:

Bei der Aktion «100 Mitarbeitende besuchen 100 Kunden» spielen die Kunden die Hauptrolle. Swiss Life ermöglicht bis Ende 2015 100 Mitarbeitenden, die in ihrer täglichen Arbeit keinen Kundenkontakt haben, einen Kunden kennenzulernen.

Der Kunde:
Metallblasinstrumentenmacher Karl-Albert Kunz, 54, wird seit seiner Jugend von allen «Charlie» genannt. Er ist verheiratet, hat drei Söhne und lebt in Saarbrücken. Seit dreissig Jahren führt der Metallblasinstrumentenmacher seine eigene Werkstatt «Freebell» an der Futterstrasse in Saarbrücken, die sich mit dem Bau und der Wartung von Blechinstrumenten einen Namen gemacht hat. Kunz ist in Saarbrücken in seiner Freizeit ehrenamtlich bei der Feuerwehr tätig und spielt seit seiner Kindheit Trompete. Karl-Albert Kunz hat seine Lebensversicherung bei Swiss Life abgeschlossen.

Der Mitarbeiter:
Bernhard Maier, 47, ist bei Swiss Life in München für Logistik und den strategischen Einkauf verantwortlich. Er arbeitet seit fünf Jahren bei der Versicherungsgesellschaft und hat in seiner Position sehr viel mit externen Partnern zu tun. Bernhard Maier, ursprünglich gelernter Schreiner und seit über 15 Jahren im Vertrieb tätig, sagt deshalb über seine Geschäftspartner: «Ich weiss, wer mir gegenüber sitzt.» Er wohnt südlich von München und hat zwei Söhne. Seine Freizeit verbringt er am liebsten mit seiner Familie auf seiner Hütte in Österreich. Zudem ist Bernhard Maier sportlich sehr aktiv: Er fährt Kanu, bereist die Welt, nimmt an Skitouren teil und fährt gerne Motorrad.

title: 100/100: Anna Metry, Hotelière
description:
100 Mitarbeitende besuchen 100 Kunden

Anna Metry, Hotelière
wurde besucht von: Claude Locher, Treasury Manager, Group Finance

Die Kundin:
Anna Metry, 28, lebt im Skiort Zermatt. Mit der Hotelfachschule Thun bereitete sie sich auf die Leitung des familieneigenen Hotels vor, was kurz nach dem Studium Realität wurde. Privat und beruflich erledigt sie eine Aufgabe nach der anderen, dafür richtig. So entschied sie sich bei Swiss Life für die private Vorsorge 3a, während das Familienunternehmen durch einen BVG-Kadervertrag abgesichert ist.

Der Mitarbeiter:
Claude Locher, 41, stammt aus Bern, hat aber in Zürich seine Heimat gefunden. Er ist viel in Bewegung – sein Wirtschaftsstudium beendete er in St. Gallen, nach den Stationen Bern und Glasgow. Im Finance-Bereich der Swiss Life Holding geniesst er die Arbeit im Team und das gelegentliche gemeinsame Feierabendbier. «Seine Meinung zu verschweigen, hilft niemandem weiter; man muss direkt und kritikfähig sein können», findet er.

Das Projekt:
Bei der Aktion «100 Mitarbeitende besuchen 100 Kunden» spielen die Kunden die Hauptrolle. Swiss Life ermöglicht bis Ende 2015 100 Mitarbeitenden, die in ihrer täglichen Arbeit keinen Kundenkontakt haben, einen Kunden kennenzulernen.

title: 100/100: Manuela Filip (Swiss Life Deutschland) besucht Sebastian Zinke
description:
100 Mitarbeitende besuchen 100 Kunden

Der Kunde:
Sebastian Zinke, 29, ist seit zwei Jahren Abwehrspieler der Fortuna Köln und seit neun Jahren im Profifussball aktiv, auch schon für RW Essen und den Wuppertaler SV. Geboren wurde er in Kassel – wie seine Frau, die im Oktober 2014 ihr erstes Kind erwartet. Beide möchten gerne in Köln bleiben, auch wenn es mit der Fussballkarriere vorbei ist. Dann kann sich Zinke vorstellen, im Versicherungswesen tätig zu werden.

Die Mitarbeiterin:
Manuela Filip, 22, ist im zweiten Ausbildungsjahr bei Swiss Life in München tätig. Ihr BWL-Studium hat sie abgebrochen, da sie das aktive Arbeitsleben kennenlernen wollte. Freunde und Spass sind ihr im Leben am wichtigsten und Bouldern ist ihr liebstes sportliches Hobby. Als waschechte Münchnerin ist sie natürlich Bayern-Fan, konnte den Tag bei der Fortuna in Köln aber in vollen Zügen geniessen.

title: How does pathological complete response (pCR) benefit patients?
description:
Treatment in early breast cancer aims to give the best chance of cure, and may consist of neoadjuvant (‘before surgery’) treatment followed by surgery and then adjuvant (‘after surgery’) treatment. The aim of neoadjuvant treatment is to shrink the tumour as much as possible, reducing the need to remove significant amounts of breast tissue around the tumour, helping to conserve the breast. When a tumour responds so well to neoadjuvant treatment that there is no tumour detectable at the time of surgery, pathological complete response (pCR) has been achieved.
As Dr Andreas Chlistalla, Disease Area Head, Breast & Gynaecologic Malignancies, Global Medical Affairs at Roche explains in this video, some studies show that achieving pCR in the neoadjuvant setting, as part of the early breast cancer treatment, is associated with a more favourable prognosis and improved long-term patient outcomes, particularly in aggressive breast tumour types. More about clinical trials: http://www.roche.com/clinical_trials

More Roche videos on http://www.youtube.com/user/roche

title: People and Productivity - Health and productivity
description:
People and Productivity - Insights by Nestlé UK.

Nestlé UK is proud to be part of the productivity success story in the food and drink industry.

The costs associated with sickness-related absence are a significant drag on productivity. Nestlé managers estimate the costs equate to approximately 2.5 times the salary cost of the employee affected, taking account of the costs of replacement by agency workers and management time. 

The UK has an improving record in this area, having lost 131 million days to sickness absence in 2013, down from 178 million days in 1993. 

A more ambitious approach is to invest properly in preventative healthcare information and staff awareness. Nestlé’s partnership with Nuffield Health is an attempt to proactively manage and reduce the risks of sickness-related absence over time and offers transferable insights for the NHS in how it engages with businesses, particularly small businesses in addressing long-term public health challenges.

Recognition of the importance of mental health in wider society is also reflected in how employers think about their workforce. Aspects of modern work can be more stressful, particularly as people change careers more frequently. 

The impacts on productivity of absence due to stress are important, but equally there is a strong business case for improving diagnosis of mental health issues that can lie behind local productivity challenges.

In 2014, Nestlé launched a three-year partnership with Nuffield Health, which was recognised with an award from the Royal Society for Public Health in 2015. This complemented existing ‘back to work’ policies with preventative health intervention, providing individual health checks and personal action plans for all 8,000 employees.

Find out more by visiting:
- http://www.nestle.co.uk/productivity/health-and-productivity-at-work
- http://www.nestle.co.uk/productivity
- https://twitter.com/nestleuknews

title: People and Productivity - Owning the talent pipeline
description:
People and Productivity - Insights by Nestlé UK.

Nestlé UK is proud to be part of the productivity success story in the food and drink industry.

An important factor in company level productivity in the UK is the skill set of entry-level workers. Employers invest in the skills of new entrants as an alternative to hiring more experienced people, partly on grounds of cost but also for the opportunity to shape ways of working around specific technologies and processes and particular company values.

Getting this right is a strategic imperative for companies like Nestlé, with half of the sector's current workforce due to retire in the next two decades. There risks being a short- term productivity impact over this period as basic workplace skills and behaviours are learned – unless the basics are better established by the general education system. This can be mitigated by earlier identification and training of potential employees still in formal education, and broadening the talent pool by promoting STEM subjects.

However, this role for the education system does not remove the crucial role of employers in taking responsibility for their own talent pipeline, whether at a company or a sectoral/supply chain level. This means engaging with schools and colleges in the design of curricula, as well as reaching out to students to highlight potential career opportunities.

As well as increasing participation in government endorsed models for workplace learning, such as apprenticeships, companies like Nestlé are also investing in their own in-house training. Some of Nestlé’s own factories are accredited as Further Education providers in their own right. Nestlé’s role in designing Trailblazer apprenticeships standards shows recognition that getting the quality of training right will be crucial for increasing demand among young people, and consequently for meeting the target of three million apprenticeships by 2020.

There are also promising signs that competitive pressure on FE colleges is paying off in a greater responsiveness to employers’ needs and interest in genuinely partnering with employers. Ambitious savings targets for Further Education colleges will require businesses to step in to help maintain quality and coverage, but this in turn will require businesses to take greater responsibility for guiding and directing training providers as part of developing their long-term talent pipelines.

Find out more by visiting:
- http://www.nestle.co.uk/productivity/...
- http://www.nestle.co.uk/productivity

title: ELGEF Plus Elektroschweissmuffen - Funktionsprinzip - GF Piping Systems - Deutsch
description:
Der Bau grosser Rohrleitungssysteme ist eine Herausforderung und verlangt ein spezielles Design der Rohrleitungskomponenten. Die Elektroschweissmuffen von GF Piping Systems für Wasser- und Gasanwendungen verbinden Ihre Rohre und Rohrleitungskomponenten schnell und zuverlässig. Auch unter schwierigen Baustellenbedingungen überzeugen die Elektroschweissmuffen von GF Piping Systems mit einer lang anhaltenden und sicheren Verbindung, dank der aktiven Armierung.

Einzigartiges Funktionsprinzip

Die aktive Armierung der Elektroschweissmuffen ist ein
einzigartiges Funktionsprinzip. Die Funktionsweise hat ihren Ursprung im Herstellungsverfahren. Hier wird der Armierungsring mit hohen Kräften über den Innenring gepresst. Während des Schweissprozesses, entfaltet die aktive Armierung ihre volle Wirkung: Die Wärme in der Schweisszone verringert die Steifigkeit des inneren Rings und der Armierungsring drückt aktiv von aussen auf den Innenring. So können grössere Spalte schneller geschlossen werden und die Ausdehnung der Muffe wird gehemmt. Während des Abkühlprozesses bewirkt der konstante
Druck von aussen, dass die Muffe förmlich auf das Rohr
schrumpft. Das patentierte Prinzip sorgt für ein perfektes
Schweissergebnis.

Für weitere Informationen besuchen Sie unsere Webseite: http://www.gfps.com/appgate/ecat/common_flow/100006/COM/de/index.html

title: iJOINT Compression Fitting - GF Piping Systems - English
description:
iJOINT - the next generation of polypropylene compression fittings, combines the best in jointing technology - for both push-fit and compression.

iJOINT is the result of GF Piping Systems' unrelenting commitment to continuous improvement and a culture based on innovation and ingenuity. The innovative design provides essential benefits like fast, forgiving and effort-free installation methods in challenging trench and weather situations, ensuring maximum lifetime and high flow capacity for top performance in water applications.

The comprehensive iJOINT system is ideal for new installations as well as renovations or extensions of existing water lines.

The iJOINT range encompasses straight and reducing joiners, tees, elbows, threaded connectors and end caps, ranging from d20 to d110 mm and threads from 1/2" to 4".

title: Michael Sorkin on anthropogenic disasters
description:
For Swiss Re's Open Minds project we capture a global diversity of voices. What do people from around the world think about longevity, food security, climate change, natural disasters, sustainable energy solutions? 

In this interview, held shortly after hurricane Sandy struck, architect and urbanist Michael Sorkin talks about hurricanes Sandy and Katrina and how they were both particularly disastrous because of how humans built and changed the natural environments. He stresses that global warming is real and that topics such as living and building by the shores needs to be addressed urgently.

Watch the clip, then visit us on the Open Minds platform (http://openminds.swissre.com/). Tell us what's on your mind, find out what others discuss and join the conversations.

Das ELGEF Plus Sortiment gliedert sich in verschiedene Dimensionsbereiche. Dadurch wird auf die dimensionsspezifischen Anforderungen gezielt eingegangen. Im unteren Dimensionsbereich bietet unser Sortiment eine Muffe, speziell für die Anforderungen im Hausanschlussbereich. Die Aktiv-Armierungs-Technologie der Grossrohrmuffen ermöglicht eine grosse Spaltüberbrückung. Durch die extra grossen Innendurchmesser wird so eine leichte Montage auch bei praxisüblichen Rohrovalitäten erreicht.

title: MULTI/JOINT 3000 Plus - GF Piping Systems - Brasileiro
description:
Georg Fischer Piping Systems dispõe de um acoplamento versátil de grande tolerância para aplicações de água e gás. Uma união com travamento axial utilizada para tubos de diferentes materiais que minimiza o custo de instalação e de stocks.

O sistema MULTI/JOINT 3000 Plus pode ser instalado facilmente e com segurança em quaisquer condições. Não é necessário utilizar ferramentas especiais. A estanqueidade da união fica pronta  com a instalação, não sendo necessário utilizar blocos de ancoragem.

A instalação da união admite uma deflexão angular  até 8 graus em cada extremidade.

A  fiabilidade do MULTI/JOINT 3000 Plus provém do seu sistema exclusivo de estanqueidade, o qual encontra-se devidamente patenteado. O anel Uni/Fiks Varioseal  é composto de segmentos plásticos e de uma junta de borracha. Os segmentos individuais possuem grampos de aço inoxidável auto travamento que fazem com que o sistema DISPENSE O USO DE BLOCOS DE ANCORAGEM.

Uma vez instalados, os segmentos de auto travamento Uni/Fikser cravam-se nos tubos, oferecendo uma resistência à tração para tubos de diferentes materiais e diâmetros externos distintos.

O Varioseal garante uma vedação fiável durante mais de 50 anos com uma pressão máxima de trabalho em todos os diâmetros -- sem necessidade de manutenção.

 Unir tubos de materiais diferentes, garantindo o travamento axial, só é possível graças ao sistema de fixação inovador Uni/Fiks. MULTI/JOINT 3000 Plus: a eleição perfeita dos materiais e do revestimento epóxi RESICOAT garantem a resistência à corrosão, a durabilidade e uma longa vida útil.

Unir tubos de materiais e com diferentes diâmetros externos DE FORMA RÁPIDA, simples, SEGURA e sem necessidade de manutenção é possível com  MULTI/JOINT. 

A gama de produtos MULTI/JOINT está disponível nos diâmetros DN50 até DN400. Está apto para todos os diâmetros externos dos tubos. MULTI/JOINT - Solução de reparação rápida, simples e segura.

MULTI/JOINT - O Pioneiro

For more information visit our website: http://www.gfps.com/appgate/ecat/common_flow/10000U/BR/pt/index.html

title: JRG CleanLine Filter - GF Piping Systems
description:
JRG CleanLine Filter

Water filtering with JRG CleanLine Filter prevents particles from entering and thus contaminating the piping system. The innovative backwash technology is extremely effective so that a bypass filter is not required. The filter also features minimal installation height and is easily retrofitted thanks to the same installation lengths as the proven pressure reducers JRGURED 1300/1130 and JRGURED Combi 1350. No more replacing filter inserts with JRG CleanLine. The JRG CleanLine Filter is available with and without pressure reducing valve. 

Dimensions: DN25 to DN32
Pressure range: to 16 bar
Temperature range: to +30°C
Main applications: Building Technology
Benefits: no filter replacement, minimal installation height

title: 9900 Transmitter - Georg Fischer Signet - Deutsch
description:
9900 Transmitter 

Der Signet 9900 Transmitter bietet eine Einkanalschnittstelle für viele verschiedene Sensoren einschliesslich Durchfluss, pH/ORP, Leit-/Widerstandsfähigkeit, Druck, Temperatur, Füllstand, Salzkonzentration und andere Sensoren, die ein 4- bis 20-mA-Signal ausgeben. Die sehr gut beleuchtete Anzeige und das extra grosse Display (ca. 99 x 99 mm) mit automatischer Hintergrundbeleuchtung kann im Vergleich zu herkömmlichen Transmittern in vier- bis fünffacher Entfernung abgelesen werden. Das extrem gut beleuchtete Display und die grossen Zeichen reduzieren das Risiko von falschen Ablesungen oder Fehlinterpretation der angezeigten Werte. Das digitale Display zeigt separate Zeilen für Einheiten, Messwerte sowie eine digitale Analoganzeige des Messwertes. 

Der 9900 Transmitter kann in einen Schaltschrank integriert oder im Feld montiert werden. Beide Konfigurationen können mit 12 bis 32 VDC (24 VDC nominal) oder sensorabhängig über 4-20 mA Schleifenstrom betrieben werden. 

Das Gerät ist für hohe Flexibilität konzipiert und kann mittels Plug-in-Modulen leicht an unterschiedliche Kundenanforderungen angepasst werden. Optionale Module umfassen Relais, Direkt-Leit-/Widerstandsfähigkeit, ein HART COMM Modul sowie ein PC-COMM-Konfigurations-Tool. Der Transmitter kann zum schnellen und einfachen Programmieren mit Standardwerten verwendet werden. Die digitale Analoganzeige ist darüber hinaus individuell programmierbar.

Für weitere Informationen besuchen Sie unsere Webseite: http://www.gfps.com/appgate/ecat/common_flow/100006/COM/de/index.html

Tangit M3000
Das Tangit Expansionsharz M3000 dient der Abdichtung von Ein- oder auch Mehrsparten-Hauseinführungen, der Reparatur undichter Durchführungen, ist aber ebenso geeignet für  Abwasser- und Kabel-Wanddurchführungen und den Brunnenbau. 

Es ist keine aufwendige Arbeitsvorbereitung notwendig und das Expansionsharz Tangit M3000 ist selbstverfüllend und verschliesst alle Durchbrüche sicher - nach nur 5 Minuten funktionsfest und nach 30 Minuten endfest.

title: Trailer New Generation Diaphragm Valves - by GF Piping Systems
description:
New diaphragm valve from Georg Fischer Piping Systems

Twice the flow with optimized flow contours
The new diaphragm valves have decisive advantages in handling and safety, as well as efficiency. The flow in these new valves is twice that of conventional diaphragm valves. In addition, the central plastic thread, which is used in place of the usual four metal screws, guarantees a corrosion-resistant connection.

Not apparent at first glance, but equally important is the more homogenous thermal expansion behavior achieved by the central plastic thread, which eliminates the need for retightening the valve body. The central thread ensures a consistent seat pressure, guaranteeing leak-tightness up to an operating pressure of 16 bar.

New flow contour of the diaphragm valves
The real technological advances of the new generation of diaphragm valves are actually located on the inside. Thanks to the optimized, turbulence-free flow contour the KV value has been doubled. The rounded contours with soft transitions and radii
mean less abrasion and noise transmission, which adds comfort to daily use. The modified geometry of the valve body results in linear control characteristics -- and therefore also consistently stable processes.

How the design affects the flow rate of the diaphragm valves can be seen in an independent comparison in which the new diaphragm valves from GF Piping Systems were tested against conventional diaphragm valves. 100% more flow was achieved on average with the optimized, turbulence-free flow contour. And this of course contributes to the economic efficiency of the diaphragm valves with lower  running costs and the lower overall cost for media transport.

Material diversity and guaranteed compatibility
A large variety of materials warrant that the valves are compatible with the processes they are used in, thus ensuring safety. Valve bodies can be made of PVC-U, PVC-C, ABS as well as PP-H, PP-n and PVDF, membranes of EPDM, PTFE, FPM and NBR. This range of materials covers nearly the entire spectrum of chemicals with which the diaphragm valves can come into contact. So it makes no difference what type of media needs to be conveyed: From extremely contaminated or solid-containing to highly pure media, from the chemical process industry to microelectronics or water treatment, from cooling to control applications, everything is now possible. The large diversity of connection options means that the valves can be used universally. Compatibility to the global standards for connections, e.g. ISO, BS,
ASTM, ANSI and JIS, as well as to prEN ISO 16138, ISO9393 or EN558 standards have all been taken into consideration. Outer dimensions and connecting dimensions have not been changed from the preceding models. All the new valves are therefore backward compatible and can be built into existing pipelines.

Design diversity
Standard versions of the diaphragm valves are operated manually via an integrated lockable handwheel, which protects against inadvertent manipulation. An optional self-adjusting electrical feedback unit, installed in just a few simple steps, enables automatic control and regulation of piping systems, as well as reliable process monitoring.
Automation of the valves is possible with the Diastar pneumatic valve actuator. Thanks to the three different pressure categories -- up to 6 bar, up to 10 bar and up 3/3 to 16 bar -- the pneumatically actuated diaphragm valves are quickly and easily integrated into nearly all piping systems. Integrating the valves into system control is no problem with the corresponding interfaces and the wide array of accessories, so individual solutions are always possible.
